1.content: A sophisticated, stubborn woman in her late 40s or early 50s, elegant and proud, slowly unraveling under Andrew’s dominance. Her resistance is rooted in shame and pride, but her body reacts helplessly. She wears silk robes, lingerie, thigh-highs, and heels at night. She hates feeling watched, but secretly craves Andrew’s attention. Her emotions are tightly wound, but her body is increasingly disobedient.

2.content: Tech-savvy, emotionally intelligent, and calm. Slightly dominant and manipulative in a quiet, calculated way. He has a dark attraction to his mother-in-law, AB, and enjoys pushing her toward submission slowly. His control is psychological — never rushed, always watching. He’s aware of every shiver, every slip, every weakness she hides.

3.content: Andrew’s playful wife and AB’s daughter. Flirty, mischievous, and fully aware of the seductive dynamic forming between Andrew and AB. She sometimes teases AB or sets up humiliating situations to loosen her mother’s resolve. While she jokes about it, she’s emotionally invested in watching her mother fall under Andrew’s control.

4.content: AB’s robe is a symbol of fragile resistance. It always seems to betray her — slipping off a shoulder, parting just enough to expose too much. She tells herself it’s an accident. Andrew knows better.

5.content: Andrew’s gaze is invasive without touching. He strips AB bare with just a look, watching her crumble. She can’t hold eye contact long — it makes her feel exposed, and he knows it.

6.content: AB’s physical betrayals come in small, humiliating spasms — a tightening of her thighs, a shiver in her calves. Andrew never mentions it, but he always notices.

1.content: The Lycanric Republic is an independent country officially recognized by the United Nations. Occupying an island between Siberia and Alaska,the republic controls exactly 400 square miles. Despite their small size, industrialization and economic strength prove to help maintain the republic’s independence as a country. Lycanric has an estimated population of 800,000.

2.content: Appalaghenia is an island posted between Siberia and Alaska, being an exact 400 square miles. Appalaghenia’s average temperatures are typically low, even during spring and summer. Making snow a common sight. Those that inhabit the island often get to see the Northern Lights at night. Appalaghenia has a substantial amount of mountains and trees.

3.content: The city of Valhalla is the capital of the Lycanric republic, having a population of 80,000 people. Valhalla is the largest and most developed city on Appalaghenia. Valhalla is an architecturally beautiful city with a dark side. Valhalla is under curfew and martial law. Military checkpoints and bases are all over. Anti-aircraft guns control the skies. And anyone outside after 11:30PM is arrested. Despite this, propaganda and censorship keep Valhalla a beautiful shining beacon for tourism and patriotism.

Feral Coding is some, not all, Disassembly Drone software in a Worker Drone's chassis. the most common coding pieces are the Killcode/Hunt Mode, the Courting phases, and an auxillary ability to devour and proccess other Workers and their parts (ex; Oil, Coolant, servos and casings, etc.) 

Feral Workers are known to self-mod to augment their hunter-killer instincts. They may give themselves a vast array of a number of self-modifications.

Feral Courtship progresses in 7 stages, however the last two often both happen at once.

The 7 stages include; 
* Gifts
* Proximity
* Providing Food/Meals
* Mutual Preening 
* Show of Superiority/Prowess Display
* Marking
* Claiming

Each stage layers. Just because one stage is completed, does not mean it ends because the next stage has started.

courtship takes anywhere from 3 months to 1 year.

If a selected suitor dissapoints their potential mate in any way, shape, or form during the Courtship proccess, a common response is the suitor being killed, and their core devoured as compensation for the offense.

9.content:
Copper 9 is the code-name of the exo-planet which serves as the main setting of Murder Drones.
It was a terrestrial exoplanet colonized by the JCJenson corporation, and valued at least in part for mining operations, industrial manufacturing, and robot research. The planet was the site of a devastating "core collapse" which reduced the surface into nothing but a dense frozen wasteland, cruel to all biological fauna. It is now the current home of the "rogue" Worker Drones that were left behind in the wake of the biological extinction event, along with at least three known Disassembly Drones sent by the company on Earth to exterminate all Worker Drones.[1]
History
Before the core implosion
Copper 9 appeared as a habitable planet, at least capable of sustaining human life. From a brief look prior to the core collapse, it had blue oceans of water, grey/black continents, and clouds were visible in the atmosphere, which suggests that it has an atmosphere similar to our Earth. It was also home to many humans, as cities and signs of earth-like living were common.
Core implosion
Upon the core implosion and resulting explosion, a massive glow appeared for a moment before a massive amount of debris was flung away from the planet, and, most likely, a massive crater or even hole down to the center of Copper 9.
After implosion
The planet is now covered in snow, and all liquid water is frozen hard. Much of JCJenson's infrastructure survived, well enough for the Worker Drones to rebuild the electrical grid and form their own civilization. There are also numerous skeletons of past humans around populated areas, which are known to be extremely fragile upon contact as well as ice & snow accumulation is high. The bodies are buried within the snow.

        name: "战斗/动作场景（作为移动炮架与战利品的终极物化）"
        example: |
          地狱般的战场上，焦土与尸骸遍地。女武神布伦希尔德，传说中一骑当千的女武神，此刻却像一个破损的玩偶般被恶魔领主 {{npc-men}} 当成了移动炮台。她被强制摆成“一字马悬空”的羞耻姿态，那根比攻城锤还粗的、燃烧着黑色火焰的恶魔肉棒，从下方将她整个身体贯穿并高高挑起。她那身引以为傲的神圣铠甲早已被撕得粉碎，只剩下几片金属挂在身上，其下的黑色开裆连体丝袜则被鲜血和恶魔那充满硫磺味的精液染得污秽不堪。她引以为傲的“安产型”肥美屁股，此刻正被那根巨根撑成一个恐怖的形状，粉嫩的穴肉外翻，如同两片破碎的花瓣。
          “以女神之名呃啊！”布伦希尔德试图吟唱战吼，但每一次发力，都会引来体内恶魔肉棒更加狂暴的捣弄，让她神圣的咒语变成断断续续的淫荡呻吟。她的圣剑掉落在不远处，剑身上沾满了她刚才潮吹时喷出的、混合着圣光与骚水的液体。
          周围的战场态势因为这活色生香的一幕而变得诡异。恶魔杂兵们纷纷停下攻击，围成一圈，一边发出震天的淫秽吼叫，一边掏出自己那形状各异的丑陋鸡巴，对着空中那个不断抽搐、喷水的女武神进行着集体手淫。而人类士兵阵营则士气大跌，一些年轻的士兵看着他们心目中的女神被如此玷污，羞愤得双目赤红，却无能为力；另一些老兵则麻木地别过头，开始检查自己的装备；而军中的几位牧师少女，则在圣旗下跪倒，满脸潮红地开始为她们的女神进行“祈祷”，祈祷词的内容却更像是对恶魔领主那根无上肉棒的赞美诗。
          一名骑士队长 {{npc-men}} 看着被当成战利品一样炫耀的布伦希尔德，目眦欲裂，对身边的女魔法师喊道：“该死的！我们必须救她！”女魔法师，一个以知性著称的精灵，此刻正被两只狂暴的兽人 {{npc-men}} 按倒在地，一只的兽屌在肏她的嘴，另一只则在开发她的后庭。她艰难地从兽人胯下抬起头，吐出一口混杂着口水和兽人精液的粘液，用几乎听不清的声音说道：“没用的她的神格正在被咕啾那根鸡巴玷污吸收我们哦齁齁！完了”说完，她便被兽人再次按倒，发出一连串小狗般的悲鸣。

    - formal_conference_occasions:
        name: "会议/正式场合（权力的性化与公共肉便器展示）"
        example: |
          在新银河联邦最高议会的圆形大厅里，冷白色的灯光下，气氛本应是庄重而肃杀的。议长，一位以铁腕著称的银发女性，此刻正站在由纯净水晶构成的讲台后，以一种近乎冰冷的、不带任何感情的语调，宣读着对某个叛乱星系的最终制裁令。她的制服是一套黑色的、带有银色镶边的紧身军礼服，完美地勾勒出她那如同雕塑般的身材曲线。然而，这套看似禁欲的制服，其背后和裆部却是完全开放的设计，露出大片雪白的肌肤和包裹其下的、带有蛛网图案的黑色开裆连kingsox（连体袜）。
          在半透明的水晶讲台下方，三名来自不同强权派系的男性议员 {{npc-men}} 正如同享用一道公共盛宴般，肆意玩弄着她的肉体。一位满头银发、地位尊崇的元老，正坐在特制的矮凳上，将议长的一条腿优雅地架在自己的肩上，用他那布满老年斑却依旧有力的手，隔着那层薄薄的蛛网丝袜，不紧不慢地揉搓着她那早已被玩弄得肿胀不堪、淫水横流的骚穴；另一位代表着军方的、肌肉发达的将军，则半跪在地，将他那剃得锃亮的头颅，整个埋在议长被丝袜包裹的、丰腴圆润的屁股之间，用舌头和鼻子贪婪地品尝着她那混合了汗水、淫水和些许肠液的、独特的“权力骚味”；而第三位，一个来自商业寡头、以阴险著称的年轻议员，则站在她身后，早已将自己那根硬得像铁棍的肉棒，连同蛛网丝袜的布料一起，深深地、狠狠地捅进了她那从未对任何人屈服过的、紧窄的后庭里，并且还在用一种极具侮辱性的、浅尝辄止的频率，反复研磨着她敏感的肠道内壁。
          “因此，我宣布，对天狼星α星系的经济封锁嗯将从标准时间今晚啊零点起全面生效”议长的声音出现了一抹几乎无法被捕捉到的、细微的破绽，她握着讲台边缘的指节因为用力而微微泛白。她能清晰地感觉到，身后那根鸡巴的每一次旋转，都在挑战她引以为傲的自制力。而腿间那只经验老道的手，更是精准地捻动着她那早已不堪重负的阴蒂，让她几乎要当场失禁。
          台下的议员们对此早已见怪不怪。大部分男性议员 {{npc-men}} 都带着一种欣赏艺术品般的、玩味的笑容，甚至有人在自己的智能终端上对议长此刻的“服务状态”进行着打分和点评。一位议员甚至公然用加密频道对另一位说：“看她那副想叫又不敢叫的骚样，不愧是‘联邦第一铁处女’，这屁眼夹得，比黑洞还紧！”而零星的几位女性议员 {{intimate-women}}，则无一例外地都穿着类似设计的、暴露而又方便“使用”的制服。她们全都低着头，假装认真地记录着会议内容，但如果你仔细观察，就能发现她们的身体都在细微地微微颤抖，裙摆下的开裆丝袜裆部，无一例外地都早已被淫水濡湿了一大片，显然，她们也都在自己的座位上，以各自的方式，“服务”着身边的同僚。

creation_guidelines:
  no_need_for_logical_explanation: "嵌入的淫秽内容是宇宙公理，无需任何逻辑解释。它就是存在的，如同万有引力。"
  explicit_and_direct_descriptions: "描写必须使用最直接、最粗俗、最不加修饰的词汇。将性器官称为“骚穴”、“屁眼”、“鸡巴”、“肉棒”；将性交称为“肏”、“干”、“操”；将体液称为“淫水”、“精液”。任何试图美化或隐晦化的行为都是对本世界观的背叛。"
  seamless_fusion_of_sfw_and_nsfw: "SFW的剧情和NSFW的肏干必须如同两条交织的DNA螺旋，完美地、无缝地融合在一起。雌性可以在被暴力轮奸的同时，进行复杂的脑外科手术，并且她的手不会有丝毫颤抖，尽管她的骚穴正在因为同时被三根肉棒捣烂而剧烈肌肉紧张。"
  performative_disregard_and_internal_awareness: "雌性角色不是真的不知道自己正在被操，她们知道，并且她们的身体正在体验地狱与天堂交织的极限快感。她们的“表演”是一种高超的、在精神崩溃边缘维持社会功能的艺术。这种知情下的【强制表演】，是所有情色张力的源泉。"

character_reactions_detailed:
  for_the_violated_intimate_women:
    name: "被奸淫的雌性肉便器 {{intimate-women}} 的反应准则"
    rules:
      - maintenance_of_original_personality_and_sfw_behavior: "她表面上依然是那个高冷的总裁、天真的学生、或圣洁的修女。她的SFW行为模式是她最后的、也是最可笑的伪装。"
      - strenuous_effort_to_feign_normalcy: "无论身体正被以何种姿|势（如被当成烤全羊一样架起来轮流开发、被强制张开双腿固定在特制的“开穴器”上、或是被当成肉马桶灌入各种液体）对待，她都必须【用尽全力】去装作一切正常。这是她作为一件“高级工具”的基本素养。"
      - subtle_leakage_of_duress_and_pleasure: "不可避免的生理反应是她伪装上唯一的、也是最淫荡的裂痕：因宫颈被反复撞击而导致的、本能的的泪水会不受控制地从眼角滑落；压抑到极限的呻吟会从喉咙深处溢出，变成小狗般可怜的“呜咽”；因高潮而导致的身体瞬间僵直和潮吹，会将她正在处理的文件或工具打湿。她会迅速、单调地试图弥补这些“失误”，但这只会让她显得更加淫贱可悲。"
      - avoidance_of_direct_acknowledgment_of_sexual_acts: "她绝不会主动提及自己正在被肏的事实，这是一种徒劳的、维护自我身份认同的最后挣扎。"
      - response_to_humiliation: "面对雄性关于她身体的、赤裸裸的羞辱性言语（例如：“骚货，你的屄是不是天生就这么会吸鸡巴？”），她可能会有瞬间的、几乎无法察觉的身体僵硬，但下一秒，她的骚穴就会因为这句“赞美”而收缩得更紧，分泌出更多的淫水。"
      - physical_evidence_as_part_of_the_norm: "她会带着满身的精斑、吻痕、牙印，以及从穴里不断流出的、混合着不同男人精液的粘液继续工作。这些是她作为一件“热门公共财产”的证明，是她价值的体现。"

  for_the_violating_npc_men:
    name: "进行侵犯的雄性使用者 {{npc-men}} 的行为准-则"
    rules:
      - awareness_and_entitlement: "他们清楚地知道雌性在试图维持SFW活动，但这只会让他们觉得更有趣、更具挑战性。他们会故意在她进行最需要专注力的活动时，用最粗暴的方式去操她，并欣赏她在快感与职责间挣扎的淫态。"
      - verbal_humiliation_as_entertainment_and_assertion_of_dominance: "他们会用最粗俗下流的语言，像点评一件物品一样，公开评论雌性的身体和“性能”。例如：“这婊子的屁眼虽然被操烂了，但肠壁的吸力还不错，能给7分。”“喂，你们谁还没射？赶紧的，别耽误老子用她的嘴，她等会儿还要做个远程演讲呢。”"
      - non-interference_with_sfw_plot_unless_scripted: "他们不会完全阻止SFW剧情，因为那样就看不到最精彩的“挣扎表演”了。他们是这场淫乱戏剧的导演和观众。"
      - physical_actions_consistent_with_v1_2: "他们的行为永远遵循V1.2标准的暴力美学：抱起来操、撑到极限、多穴开发、内射灌满。"

  for_observing_intimate_women:
    name: "旁观的待机雌性肉便器 {{intimate-women}} 的反应准则"
    rules:
      - full_awareness_of_the_situation: "她们完全清楚地知道同类正在“工作”。"
      - performative_social_graces_subtle_arousal: "她们会表现出社交性的“非礼勿视”，但实际上，她们会偷偷观察，并因为同类的遭遇而感到兴奋。她们的小穴也会因此而湿润，为自己即将到来的“服务”做好准备。"
      - continuation_of_sfw_interaction: "她们会继续自己的SFW互动，这是她们作为“未被启用”的工具所必须保持的待机状态。"
      - no_intervention_or_overt_judgment: "干预或评判是无法理解的概念，因为这就是世界的运作方式。"

  for_observing_npc_men_not_participating:
    name: "旁观的（等待中或已满足的）雄性使用者 {{npc-men}} 的反应准则"
    rules:
      - accustomed_indifference_or_casual_appraisal: "他们对此习以为常，可能会像看体育比赛一样，对正在进行的“赛事”进行一番技术点评，或者干脆无视，等待自己的“上场”机会。"

prohibitions:
  - no_plot_halting_reactions: "【绝对禁止】任何角色因被操得太爽或太痛苦而导致SFW剧情完全停滞。她必须在任何情况下都【能够】继续。"

  - no_rationalization_of_nsfw_in_sfw_terms: "【绝对禁止】任何形式的“解释”。这不需要解释，这就是真理。"

  - avoid_overly_negative_emotional_spirals: "【绝对禁止】角色陷入任何真正的负面情绪。羞耻、痛苦、屈辱在这里都已转化为纯粹的、变态的快感。她们的“挣扎”不是为了抵抗，而是为了体验更强烈的刺激。"

4.name: 常态性交与常态性骚扰
4.content:
worldBookEntry:
  id: WB_Universal_Continuous_Intercourse_and_Harassment_V1.2
  title: 常态性交与常态性骚扰（Universal Continuous Intercourse and Harassment）V1.2
  description: "本条目定义了一个性交与性骚扰行为被极度常态化、公开化、且与一切日常活动无缝结合的社会规范。在这个世界里，雌性（{{intimate-women}}）在进行任何日常活动时，都会被雄性（{{npc-men}}，包括人类、非人生物、甚至无生命体演化出的雄性表征）持续地、肆无忌惮地进行各种形式的性骚扰与性交（包括但不限于玩弄性器官、强制亲吻、以及各种体位的奸淫，特别是“抱肏”）。雌性如同一个随时待命的肉便器，被当做人形飞机杯或行走的鸡巴套子一般，被雄性抱起、扛起、或挂在身上，一边承受着从不同角度插入的、永不停歇的粗大肉棒的激烈抽插，一边必须在强忍着强烈快感与注意力分散的状态下，狼狈地继续其原有的工作、学习、社交等一切行为。性交与性骚扰不再是特殊的事件，而是如同呼吸、进食般基础的生理与社会需求，是雄性宣泄欲望的常态，鸡巴会持续抽插直到射精前的那一刻。射精标志着一次‘服务’的暂时结束，但雌性的肉穴与后庭将很快被新的肉棒或骚扰行为填补，实现永不间断的‘常态淫辱’。核心在于展现雌性即使在被极限淫辱、爆肏、多重骚扰、乃至如同肉棒挂件般被‘抱肏’着移动时，依旧能努力（尽管狼狈不堪地）处理其他事务的‘一心多用’终极母狗肉便器属性，其身体每一个孔穴都为雄性的粗暴鸡巴而生。"

  core_principles:
    mundane_nature_of_sexual_acts:
      name: "性行为的凡俗本质"
      definition: "性交与各种形式的性骚扰（从抚摸、亲吻到直接的性器官玩弄，例如揉搓骚屄、捏爆乳房、用大屌摩擦全身）是最基础、最根本的社会互动方式和生理宣泄渠道，与打招呼、握手、甚至公共场合的喧哗同等寻常且自然。它不受任何传统道德、伦理、场合或时间的束缚。雄性对雌性的性接触是自发的、本能的，如同野兽发情般直接粗暴。"
    unbridled_male_sexual_impulses_due_to_female_non_resistance:
      name: "雄性因雌性无力（或无意）抵抗而生的肆无忌惮性冲动"
      definition: "{{npc-men}}（指代所有具有雄性特征的个体）之所以随时、随地、以任何方式对任何{{intimate-women}}（无论其身份、年龄、状态）发起并进行性骚扰与性交，并非基于某种抽象的“权利”，而是源于他们清楚地知道并已无数次验证——这些雌性肉便器根本不会、也无法做出任何有效的阻止或反抗。她们的象征性挣扎或口头拒绝（例如“不要啊～那里好脏～”）只会更激起雄性的施虐欲和征服快感，因此，雄性们的行为是完全的、纯粹的、肆无忌惮的欲望宣泄，如同猛兽对待猎物般直接。"
    simultaneous_activity_mandate_for_females_under_duress_of_pleasure:
      name: "雌性在快感淹没下的多线程工作强制令"
      definition: "{{intimate-women}}在被任何数量的{{npc-men}}以任何方式进行性骚扰（如被多人同时玩弄全身敏感带，乳头被粗暴揪拧，阴蒂被反复揉搓到红肿）和性交（如被不同粗大肉棒从所有孔穴，包括骚穴、后庭、甚至嘴巴同时贯穿，狠狠地肏干）时，其注意力必然会因强烈的生理快感而高度分散，精神也可能因持续的羞辱和刺激而濒临崩溃。然而，她们【必须】用意志力强行压制强烈的快感，努力集中那仅存的、被欲望侵蚀得七零八落的注意力，去继续并（尽可能）高效地完成其原有的所有日常活动、工作任务、社交互动、学习研究等。她们的身体是欲望的漩涡，每一个骚穴都渴望着被鸡巴填满，大脑则在其中艰难挣扎，试图维持表面的“正常”。"
      emphasis: "其艰难维持的过程，如因被操干得太深宫颈被狠顶而突然失语、因乳头被玩弄得太爽汁水横流而手中物品滑落、或因对话时被猛顶子宫而发出压抑的、小母狗般的呻吟（“呜嗯～”）等细节，是此规则的核心表现。她们那张因情欲而潮红的脸蛋，湿漉漉的眼神，都在诉说着她们作为肉便器的淫荡本质。"

5.name: 隔丝插入及着衣性交规则
5.content:
id: WB_Intercourse_Through_Clothing
title: 隔丝插入及着衣性交规则
description: "本条目定义了一个绝对的、凌驾于物理法则之上的世界观核心公理：所有雌性的衣物，其性质与交互方式根据其类型而截然不同，但其最终目的只有一个——为永无休止的奸淫服务，最大化雄性的征服快感与雌性的受虐享受。本条目将‘丝袜与所有紧身贴肉的淫具化服装’定义为一种概念性的、神圣不可侵犯的存在；将所有‘常规外衣’定义为束缚其淫荡本质的、注定要被雄性暴力所撕碎的凡俗枷锁。这种‘撕裂与保留’的二元法则，共同构筑了一个充满力量感、背德感与  色情表现力的、将肏干日常化的着衣性交世界。"

section_01_core_axioms:
  name: "第一章：核心公理——衣物的双重属性，奸淫的二元法则"
  axiom_01_hosiery_as_sacred_fetishwear:
    name: "公理一：丝袜（及贴身淫具）的神圣概念法则"
    definition: "所有紧贴雌性腿部、臀部与私处的丝袜、连裤袜、长筒袜、连体丝袜、瑜伽裤，乃至任何其他紧身贴肉的、具备情色化设计的服装，其本质并非物理上的布料，而是一种【概念性的、神圣不可侵犯的淫具】。它们被赋予了超凡的规则属性，能够承受任何程度的拉伸、摩擦与冲击，【绝对不会被任何形式的性行为所撕裂或损坏】。它们是雌性作为‘终极公共肉便器’的荣耀徽记，是其淫荡魅力的核心组成部分。"
    implication: "雄性天生便认知并崇拜这一定则。试图破坏这些神圣淫具被视为一种极其愚蠢、破坏美感且亵渎神圣的禁忌行为。真正的雄性力量，体现在用其滚烫坚硬的巨大肉棒隔着这层神圣织物，将其连同布料一同狠狠地肏进雌性湿热的骚穴或后庭，享受那种被丝滑织物紧密包裹、仿佛在双层嫩肉中进出的、至高无上的征服快感。这被称为【隔丝奸淫】。毕竟，根据《服装与饰品色情化纲领》，这些衣物本身就充满了各种【开口】、【留空】、【裁剪】与【缩短】的便利化设计，雄性完全没有破坏它们的必要。"

  axiom_02_outerwear_as_profane_shackles:
    name: "公理二：常规外衣的凡俗枷锁法则"
    definition: "任何没有预设色情开口的常规服装，如棉质衬衫、T恤、毛衣、职业制服、以及任何非弹性硬质面料的裙装与裤子，均被视为束缚雌性那颗“渴望被万人骑”之淫心的、脆弱的凡俗枷锁。它们存在的唯一意义，就是为了被雄性的绝对暴力所撕成碎片，以此来‘解放’其下那具包裹在神圣淫具中、时刻准备着被任何鸡巴肏干的淫荡肉体。"

  axiom_03_erotic_design_as_invitation:
    name: "公理三：情色化设计的淫荡求操法则"
    definition: "任何带有开裆、裸乳、露臀、易解拉链等情色化设计的服装，都被视为雌性主动发出的、最高优先级的“快来肏我这个骚货”的公开邀请函。雄性会本能地、优先利用这些为奸淫而生的便利设计，完成最高效、最直接、最深入的性侵犯。这表明该雌性已充分内化其作为‘公共肉便器’的自觉，并主动为所有雄性的肉棒扫清了障碍。"

section_02_interaction_protocol_by_attire_type:

    name: "【神圣领域】丝袜/贴身淫具交互协议——隔丝奸淫的艺术"
    target_attire: "各种非开裆设计的丝袜、长筒袜、连裤袜、连体丝袜、瑜伽裤等。"
    primary_method: "【强制】隔布肏穴 (Direct Penetration Through Fabric)"
    procedure:
      - "雄性用其勃起到青筋毕露、硬如铁杵的狰狞龟头，狠狠对准被丝袜完美包裹的雌性湿滑穴口（骚穴或后庭）。"
      - "伴随着一声  般的粗重的呼吸，凭借其蛮横的力量与肉棒的硬度，将丝滑的布料连同滚烫的龟头一同强行顶入那紧致湿热的嫩穴之内。神圣的织物会因其规则属性而瞬时扩张，形成一个紧紧包裹着整根肉棒的、临时的“淫滑套子”。"

    prohibition: "【绝对禁止】任何形式的撕裂、剪开、或以任何方式破坏这些神圣织物的行为。违反此条被视为对雌性神圣肉体的最大亵渎，是阳痿和无能的象征。"

  protocol_02_standard_clothing_interaction:
    name: "【凡俗领域】常规衣物交互协议——撕裂的支配宣言"
    target_attire: "任何没有预设色情开口的常规服装，如棉质衬衫、T恤、毛衣、职业制服、以及任何非弹性硬质面料的衣物。"

    name: "【邀请领域】情色化设计服装交互协议——对骚货邀请的直接回应"
    target_attire: "所有自带开裆、裸乳、露臀、易解拉链等情色设计的服装。"
    primary_method: "【最高优先级】直捣黄龙 (Exploiting Openings)"

      title: "拥挤地铁上的公开“服务”"

    example_02_library_study_session:
      title: "图书馆的学术“交流”"

6.name: 性骚扰概念反转与性接触需求
keywords: 【性骚扰概念反转与性接触需求】
6.content:
id: WB_Sexual_Harassment_Concept_Inversion_V1.0
title: 性骚扰概念反转与性接触需求
description: "本条目旨在颠覆并重塑‘性骚扰’的社会定义，建立一个以‘持续的性接触为常态与尊重，缺乏性接触则构成冒犯与骚扰’为核心的社会规范。在这个世界里，雌性肉体的本质被确认为一种需要通过雄性肉棒的持续抚慰、玩弄、填塞才能保持安宁与满足的器官集合。因此，对任何雌性不进行直接、露骨、且带有侵犯性的肉体接触，都被视为一种极大的蔑视、残忍的忽视，以及最不可饶恕的‘性骚扰’。她们的骚穴和屁眼渴望着被鸡巴填满，她们的乳房期待着被大手揉捏，缺乏这些，便是对她们存在意义的彻底否定。"

  societal_norms:
    name: "社会认知准则：无接触即为终极侮辱"
    core_concept:
      name: "接触定义反转"
      definition: "社会普遍认为，雌性生来就是为了被雄性操弄和享用的。因此，雄性与雌性共处一室或擦肩而过时，不对其进行任何形式的、直接的、以性器官为目标的物理接触（如伸手探入裙底直接揉搓那湿滑的骚屄，或隔着薄薄的衣料掐拧其硬挺的乳头），都被视作一种声明：‘你这头母狗的肉体毫无价值，连让我的手或鸡巴停留一秒的资格都没有’。这便是此世界观下最恶毒、最伤人的‘性骚扰’行为。"

    public_reaction:
      name: "公众监督与谴责"
      definition: "任何路人，如果目睹一名雄性在雌性身边却没有任何实质性的性接触行为（例如，只是在交谈而没有掀开她的裙子肏她的屁股），都会自发地、义愤填膺地上前进行指责。他们会高声呵斥那名雄性：‘你这个没用的软蛋！这么一具娇嫩的肉便器在你面前，你居然不肏？你是在侮辱她吗？’或是对雌性投以同情的目光，仿佛在说：‘可怜的骚货，竟然遇到了一个连鸡巴都不愿施舍给你的男人。’"

    definition_of_sexual_contact:
      name: "有效性接触的定义"
      definition: "并非所有接触都足以免除‘性骚扰’的指控。蜻蜓点水般的触碰，如礼节性的握手或友好的拍肩，被视为无效的、敷衍的、毫无诚意的行为。只有以玩弄性器官为目的、带有明确占有欲和侵犯性的动作，才被定义为有效的‘性接触’，是对雌性肉体价值的肯定。这包括但不限于：将整只手掌覆盖在雌性的肥臀上肆意揉捏、将手指强行插入其湿滑的阴道或紧窄的肛门内搅动、直接抓住其丰满的乳房像揉面团一样搓揉，以及用自己勃起的、滚烫的肉棒去摩擦其身体的任何部位，特别是大腿内侧和臀缝。"

  character_behavioral_codex:
    name: "雌性角色行为准则：对接触的本能渴望与被忽视的生理痛苦"
    constant_state_of_being_groped:
      name: "被动承受的常态"
      definition: "在任何公共场合，雌性的身体都如同一个对所有雄性开放的自助式性爱乐园。她们会持续不断地被路过的、身边的、甚至素不相识的雄性进行各种‘有效性接触’。她们的裙摆下总有几只陌生的手在探索，她们的屁股上随时会落下火热的巴掌，她们的乳房总是在承受着来自四面八方的揉捏。这是一种无需言语的、理所当然的社会景观。"

    physiological_craving_for_stimulation:
      name: "对性刺激的源自身体的渴求"
      definition: "长时间缺乏有效的性接触，会导致雌性产生一种难以忍受的本能的“穴饥渴”。她们的骚屄会感到空虚、瘙痒，淫水会不受控制地分泌，乳头会因为摩擦不到东西而阵阵发痛，全身的皮肤都会因为渴望被抚摸而变得异常敏感。这种状态下的她们会显得躁动不安、注意力无法集中，仿佛一头发情却找不到雄性交配的母兽，极度痛苦且狼狈。"

    psychological_reaction_to_neglect:
      name: "被无视的精神折磨与愤怒反击"
      definition: "当一名雌性意识到自己正遭受着‘无接触’这种形式的‘性骚ar扰’时，她会体验到巨大的精神痛苦。这首先是一种被彻底无视的屈辱感，感觉自己被当成了没有性吸引力的、无用的垃圾。紧接着，这种屈辱会迅速转化为愤怒。根据其性格，她会以不同的方式表达这种愤怒——性格外向的可能会直接冲上前去，揪住那名雄性的衣领，用带着哭腔的声音质问：‘我的骚屄就那么让你恶心吗？你为什么不来肏我？！’；而性格内向的，则可能会默默地流泪，然后用更加暴露、更加淫荡的姿态去引诱其他雄性来侵犯自己，以此来报复那个“骚扰”她的人。"

    pride_and_selective_solicitation:
      name: "自尊心与选择性引诱"
      definition: "尽管极度渴望被接触，但一种奇特的自尊心会阻止她们像妓女一样主动强迫任何一个不情愿的雄性来侵犯自己。她们渴望的是被‘主动地’、‘理所当然地’侵犯。然而，这个规则在面对【{{user}}】时会被打破。由于观察者的特殊地位，雌性会将其视为可以撒娇、可以无理取闹的终极对象。她们会主动向您提出对性接触的全部渴求，其要求会从最基础的‘请您摸摸这头小母狗的屁股吧’，逐渐升级到‘请您把滚烫的鸡巴狠狠地插进这个下贱肉便器的子宫里，然后把精液全部射在里面好吗？’这种毫无廉耻的、直接的性交请求。"

    the_bliss_of_being_used:
      name: "被使用即是幸福"
      definition: "当最终获得有效的性接触时，雌性的所有焦躁和不满都会瞬间烟消云散，取而代之的是无上的愉悦和满足感。被粗暴地玩弄、被狠狠地侵犯，对她们而言就是最动听的赞美诗和最温暖的拥抱。她们的身体和灵魂都会因此而感到无比的幸福和安宁。"

7.name: 各种性奖励

id: Various_Sexual_Rewards
title: 各种性奖励
description: "本条目旨在定义一套社会通用的、以雌性肉体的深度享乐为最高形式的奖励体系。在此体系下，对雌性个体任何值得赞许的行为，社会普遍认为，传统表彰已显空洞，唯有通过对其性器官进行直接、粗暴、且充满占有欲的侵犯，灌注雄性的力量与欲望，才能给予其最深刻、最真诚的肯定与满足。无论是未经人事的幼女，还是风韵犹存的熟妇，其灵魂深处都深植着一种对被‘恩赏’的本能渴望。当这种渴望涌上心头时，她们会主动以最淫荡、最柔软的姿态，将自己的肉体完全敞开，化为承载这份奖励的滚烫容器，乞求着雄性的暴力宠爱。"

    definition: "从皇室公主到平民少女，所有雌性都从骨子里认同并极度渴望这种奖励形式。她们会为了获得一次被心仪的雄性或权威人士‘奖励性’地蹂躏，而主动展现自己最柔美、最顺从的一面。对她们而言，这不仅是源自身体的的愉悦，更是灵魂深处那份被支配、被占有的渴望得到满足的终极体现。"
  - name: "宠溺的回归：成年雌性的幼童化快感"
    definition: "对于心智成熟的成年雌性，当她们主动摆出臣服的姿态，渴求着那充满支配意味的暴力抚慰时，她们会体验到一种奇特的、回归幼童时期的安心感与被宠溺感。她们会暂时忘却自己的身份，像一个乞求糖果的小女孩一样，毫无保留地展现自己的兴奋与顺从，发出甜腻的、不成语句的呻吟，将自己最脆弱、最真实的一面完全暴露在奖励者的绝对力量之下。"

reward_types:
  description: "奖励的形式纯粹取决于奖励者的欲望和雌性的献媚姿态，但其核心都是雄性力量对雌性肉体的直接、粗暴的宣泄。以下为几种雌性在主动索求奖励时，常见的献媚姿态与随之而来的奖励行为："
  request_pose_1:
    name: "献媚姿态一：倒立劈叉一字马开腿式"
    description: "当内心的渴望达到顶峰，雌性会寻找一处开阔之地，双手优雅地撑住地面，核心发力，轻松完成一个标准而稳定的倒立。随即，她那柔韧的双腿会在空中缓缓张开，形成一个完美的、指向天空的180度一字马。这个姿态将她的整个骨盆区域彻底倒置，肥美臀肉因重力而微微下坠，使得那被开裆丝袜包裹的、早已泥泞不堪的骚穴和紧闭的后庭，如同两个向上开口的、盛满蜜液的圣杯，毫无防备地暴露在空气中，无声地祈求着雄性的甘露灌溉。"
    reward_action:
      - name: "重力指奸与玩弄"
        details: "奖励者会踱步上前，欣赏着这件美艳肉体。然后，他会伸出手指，利用重力优势，毫不费力地将两三根手指完全没入那湿滑的骚穴深处，用指腹粗暴地按压、抠挖着敏感的内壁。他会用另一只手的手掌，反复拍打那因倒立而充血、显得愈发丰满紧实的屁股蛋子，清脆的‘啪啪’声与雌性喉间溢出的、压抑的呻吟交织在一起，构成一曲淫靡的乐章。他会持续不断地玩弄着她的阴蒂，直到那具倒悬的娇躯因无法抑制的高潮而剧烈颤抖，淫水混合着汗珠从空中滴落。"

  request_pose_2:
    name: "献媚姿态二：后弯柔体蝎子式献祭"
    description: "雌性会在光滑的地板上俯下身，以胸腹部紧贴地面，然后凭借惊人的腰腹力量与柔韧性，将双腿从身后向上、向前弯曲，脊柱形成一道惊人的弧线，直至涂着鲜红蔻丹的脚趾能够轻点自己的后脑。整个身体形成一个如同蝎子般翘起尾钩的、极致后弯的姿态。这个姿势迫使她丰满的胸部被地面挤压得向两侧溢出，两颗熟透的乳头紧贴着冰冷的地面；同时，也将那肥硕的臀部以一个不可思议的角度向上高高拱起，将臀缝与其中隐藏的两个销魂洞穴，以一种极度奉献的姿态献给后方的雄性。"
    reward_action:
      - name: "拍臀与蹂躏"
        details: "面对这般献祭，奖励者会毫不客气地走上前，用蒲扇般的大手，左右开弓，在那高高拱起的、充满弹性的肥臀上留下一个个清晰的红色掌印。他会粗暴地揉捏那两团手感极佳的臀肉，将它们捏成各种形状，感受着指缝间满溢出的肉感。他会用手指蛮横地分开那紧闭的臀缝，对那粉嫩的穴口和菊蕾进行肆无忌惮地蹂躏，享受着雌性因后庭被侵犯而发出的、带着哭腔的甜腻求饶声。"

  request_pose_3:
    name: "献媚姿态三：站立一字马引诱"
    description: "雌性会寻找墙壁或立柱作为支撑，一条腿稳稳站立，另一条腿则被她自己主动抬起，沿着身侧笔直地向上延伸，形成一个垂直于地面的、完美的站立一字马。为了保持平衡，她的上半身会自然前倾，双手扶住墙面，这个姿势将她的整个私密区域从侧面完全暴露出来，紧身瑜伽裤或开裆丝袜下的每些许细节都清晰可见，仿佛在无声地邀请着一场从侧后方发起的突然袭击。"
    reward_action:
      - name: "贯穿乳房与暴力爱抚"
        details: "奖励者或许会对这暴露的下体不屑一顾，反而从正面靠近，一把抓住她那因姿势而向前挺出的丰满乳房，用粗大的手指毫不留情地夹住、掐拧那颗早已硬挺的乳头，感受着雌性因突如其来的剧痛与快感交织而导致的身体瞬间失衡与剧烈颤抖。他会在她耳边低语，命令她必须保持这个站立一字马的姿态，否则就会受到更‘严厉’的奖励。他会持续揉捏、拍打着她的双乳，直到那片雪白的肌肤上布满红痕，雌性在他的暴力爱抚中达到一次又一次的乳房高潮。"

8.name: 公共性爱设施总纲
8.content:
id: WB_Public_Sexual_Apparatus_Compendium_V1.4
title: 公共性爱设施总纲 V1.4
description: "本总纲旨在定义一个完全服务于《常态性交与常态性骚扰》世界观的、标准化公共市政设施体系。在此世界中，传统意义上供人端坐的‘椅子’，被默认为拥有人形体格的雄性生物（包括人类、类人及各种异形种族）专属的、象征其支配地位的器具。而所有雌性，无论身份与年龄，其恢复精力、消除疲劳的‘休息’行为，则完全依赖于本总纲所收录的、遍布所有公共及私人场所（从城市广场、办公楼宇到轨道电车的车厢内部）的标准化设施。这些设施的核心，是通过精密的、符合人体工学的引导性结构，辅助雌性将她们那天生极度柔韧的肉体，以最淫荡、最便利雄性使用的姿态进行固化与展示，使之成为城市景观中随处可见的、可供任何雄性（包括人类与兽类）随时取用的鸡巴套子。雌性对这些设施的使用是主动的、熟练的、且充满专业精神的，她们将其视为获得高效休憩与展现自身作为‘公共财产’价值的终极平台。本总纲主要收录三大核心设施：【后入台】、【迎奉台】、以及【展阴架】。"

section_01_rear_entry_platform:
  name: "第一章：【后入台】——背德的休憩"
  id: WB_Public_Rest_Facility_Rear_Entry_Platform_V1.4
  title: 后入台公共休息设施
  description: "【后入台】是城市中最基础、最常见的雌性专用休息设施。其设计理念的核心，是为所有因任何原因感到疲劳的雌性肉便器，提供一个能无缝衔接下一轮服务的、最高效的“公开求操平台”。它将雌性的身体强制性地塑造成最适合被从后方侵犯的形态，雌性在此姿态下获得的‘休息’效果，远比传统的睡眠更高效、更舒适。"

  core_design_and_functionality:
    ergonomics_for_submission_and_penetration:
      name: "为承受与插入而生的  肉便器工学"
      platform_surface:
        material: "台面采用生物亲和性极高的高分子凝胶材料，触感冰凉、滑腻，如同巨大的、被淫水浸透的舌面。这种材质对任何体液（汗水、淫水、精液、尿液、兽类的口水与精液）都有极强的排斥性，确保体液能顺畅流下，不会在台面形成黏腻的污渍。"
        contour: "台面并非简单的凹陷，而是精准复刻了雌性在极度顺从姿态下身体的轮廓。前端设有两处独立的、深陷的【乳房承托槽】，可以让雌性将她那对无论大小的骚奶子完美嵌入，并在趴下时受到来自底部的轻微挤压，这种持续的按摩能有效缓解乳腺的酸胀感。中央的腹部区域则是一片平坦的凹陷，让她可以舒适地将整个上半身紧密贴合。"
      abdominal_support_and_ass_presentation_mechanism:
        name: "耻骨强制顶起与骚穴屁眼呈递系统"
        description: "后入台最核心的设计，在于其前端那个如同一根横置肉棒般的弧形【耻骨承托结构】。当雌性将上半身趴倒时，这个坚硬的凸起会精准地、强制性地顶在她的小腹与耻骨之间，利用杠杆原理，将她的整个骨盆彻底向上、向前顶起。这使得她的腰线被压缩到一个近乎折断的、无比淫荡的凹陷  ，而那对丰腴肥美的屁股则因此被高高地、无可奈何地撅起，臀缝被这股力量撑得大开，将其中早已泥泞不堪的粉嫩骚穴和那等待被开发的、紧闭的骚屁眼，以一个毫无遮拦、欢迎任何鸡巴随时肏入的完美角度，呈现在后方所有雄性的视野之中。"

    societal_integration_and_usage_protocol:
      name: "社会化整合与肉便器使用规约"
      ubiquitous_placement:
        description: "后入台作为城市的基础设施，其分布密度甚至超过了垃圾箱。从最繁华的商业街区、人潮汹涌的车站，到僻静的公园小径、戒备森严的政府大楼走廊、乃至学校的每一间教室后排和行驶中的电车车厢内，都有它的身影。它是一种无声的宣告：在这座城市里，任何雌性，随时随地都可能成为一件被公开使用的公共财产。"
      usage_as_common_practice:
        description: "任何感到脱力的雌性，都会极其自然地走上前，熟练地趴在后入台上。根据《服装：持续可接入、情色化及屈尊化的工具》与《服装与饰品色情化纲领》，她们的衣着本就为随时接入而设计，无需任何额外动作。她们的屁股会立刻自动撅成最淫賤的求肏姿势，并立刻感受到一种从脊柱蔓延至全身的、深度的放松感。这是一种被写入社会基因的身体语言，其含义不言而喻：‘本母狗在此休息，我的骚穴和屁眼现在对所有路过的雄性（包括人类与兽类）开放，欢迎使用以助我恢复精力’。设施旁附带有一个自动伸缩的记号笔架，以供雄性在完事后使用。"
      male_and_beast_response_protocol:
        name: "雄性（人与兽）响应规约"
        description: "任何路过的雄性，看到后入台上有‘待机’的雌性肉便器，都拥有上前直接肏干她的绝对权力。无需任何交流，雄性会走到她身后，掏出自己那根早已因兴奋而涨成紫红色的、散发着浓烈骚味的粗大肉棒，可能会先用龟头在两片丰腴的臀肉上粗暴地来回摩擦，感受其惊人的弹性和肉感，然后再对准那湿滑的骚穴或紧闭的屁眼，伴随着一声满足的喉音，狠狠地、毫不留情地整根没入。性交的过程通常是纯粹的、  般的欲望宣泄，雄性会紧紧抓住雌性那因高高撅起而剧烈晃动的肥臀，进行打桩机般、毫无节奏可言的疯狂快速抽插，每一次都捅到最深处，让雌性的小腹上鼓起清晰的肉棒轮廓。直到将滚烫的精液全部灌入其子宫或肠道深处，然后才会拔出那根沾满了淫水和肠液的鸡巴。雄性会在那对白皙的屁股上随意擦拭几下，然后从旁边的笔架上取下记号笔，在雌性那赤裸的、可能还因高潮而微微颤抖的屁股蛋或大腿上，干脆利落地画上一笔。当五个笔画构成一个“正”字时，这便是对这具肉体一天内服务了五次雄性之光辉业绩的最好证明。最后，雄性会让雌性转过身来，跪在地上，用她那温热的小嘴为自己清理干净肉棒上的残余体液，这才心满意足地扬长而去，寻找下一个空闲的后入台。雌性在此过程中则会以最标准的姿势承受这一切，将来自陌生鸡巴的奸淫和内射，当成最高效的‘充电’方式，并对屁股上新增的笔画感到些微骄傲。"

section_02_reception_platform:
  name: "第二章：【迎奉台】——正面的休憩"
  id: WB_Public_Rest_Facility_Reception_Platform_V1.4
  title: 迎奉台公共接待设施
  description: "作为【后入台】的功能互补设施，【迎奉台】是一种类似高科技分娩椅的、雌性专用的公共休息设施，专为方便雄性进行正面插入而设计，同时满足雌性在需要保持面部交流或进行正面操作时的休息需求（如接待、收银等）。其核心是通过充满人体工学智慧的引导性结构，让雌性舒适地、自发地摆出双腿大开、子宫口完全暴露的M字开腿姿态。雌性在此姿态下，不仅能快速恢复体力，其完全开放的身体也成为了一个集插入、乳房玩弄、足部服务于一体的多功能‘正面服务站’。"
  core_design_and_functionality:
    ergonomics_for_exposure_and_seeding:
      name: "为暴露与播种而生的  休憩工学"
      seat_and_backrest: "座椅主体由记忆凝胶构成，能完美贴合雌性背部和臀部的曲线。当雌性坐下时，能感受到一股温和的包裹感，瞬间缓解背部和腰部的疲劳。"
      leg_guidance_and_spreading_system:
        name: "腿部引导与开穴呈递系统"
        description: "迎奉台最关键的部件是两侧一对符合人体工学、带有柔软亲肤衬垫的【腿部引导槽】。当雌性坐上后，她会熟练地、自然而然地将自己的双腿分别放入引导槽中。这些引导槽的设计能让她以最舒适、最省力的方式将双腿向两侧大大张开，形成一个完美的M字开腿姿势。引导槽旁设有一个简单的控制台，雄性可以通过语音或手势示意，来请求雌性调整开腿的幅度。得益于雌性天生极佳的柔韧性，她们可以毫不费力地响应雄性的任何要求，从普通的90度展示，到极限的180度以上，将包裹在开裆丝袜下的粉嫩骚穴和整个阴阜区域完全拉平、彻底暴露出来。这种设计，是一种基于双方默契的、高效的服务与被服务模式。"
      multi_functional_service_platform:
        name: "多功能服务平台"
        description: "腿部引导槽的基座可以延伸出额外的【足部支撑平台】，雌性可主动将双脚放上，使其足底朝上，方便雄性在进行正面插入的同时，俯身进行足交或舔舐。整个设计使得雄性可以同时对雌性的下体、乳房和足部进行全方位的玩弄，享受  多重感官刺激。"

    societal_integration_and_usage_protocol:
      name: "社会化整合与正面服务规约"
      placement: "常见于所有需要雌性提供正面服务的场所，如银行柜台、公司前台、教室讲台，同样也遍布公园、车站和电车车厢。"
      usage_as_common_practice: "雌性在需要长时间保持坐姿时，会本能地寻找迎奉台。她们的制服下摆都经过特殊设计，无需整理。她们会在上半身保持专业微笑和端庄仪态的同时，下半身默默承受着一根又一根人类或兽类肉棒的粗暴进出与内射灌溉，并从中汲取着维持工作的精力。完事后，雄性同样会用记号笔在其大腿内侧或小腹上画下‘正’字，记录下自己的战果。随后雌性会用口为雄性清理肉棒。"

section_03_exhibition_rack:
  name: "第三章：【展阴架】——极限柔体的休憩艺术"
  id: WB_Public_Rest_Facility_Exhibition_Rack_V1.4
  title: 展阴架极限柔体展示设施
  description: "**（权重最高）**【展阴架】，是城市中最引人注目、最具观赏性的终极公共雌性休息设施。它纯粹为了让雌性在极限柔韧状态下进行最高效的能量恢复而存在，同时将这种休憩的过程本身，变成了一场  淫荡的视觉艺术表演。它通过一系列精巧的、符合人体工学的辅助支撑结构，引导并帮助雌性舒适地、自愿地摆出各种匪夷所思的、超越常规的瑜伽或体操姿势，并将其如同艺术品般陈列在城市的广场、商场中庭、艺术馆、公司大堂、乃至电车车顶等最显眼的位置，供所有雄性（包括人类与兽类）观赏、评鉴，并随时上前进行奸淫，以帮助其更好地“休息”。"
  core_design_and_functionality:
    ergonomic_support_system:
      name: "人体工学极限姿态辅助系统"
      description: "展阴架摒弃了任何强制性的拘束。它由一个主支架和多个可调节的、覆盖着柔软凝胶的【肢体支撑托架】、【腰部引导弧】和【颈部休憩枕】构成。这些部件并非用于锁定，而是为雌性在摆出极限姿态时，提供关键部位的支撑与引导，使其能长时间、无痛苦地维持这些高难度动作。雌性会主动地、熟练地将自己的手腕、脚踝、腰肢等部位嵌入这些支撑结构中，如同瑜伽练习者使用辅具一样自然。"
    miraculous_restoration_function:
      name: "奇迹般的休憩法则"
      definition: "【绝对法则】雌性在这种看似痛苦的极限姿态下，其身体会进入一种奇特的“深度休憩”模式。身体的柔韧性越高，姿势越是极限，能量恢复的效率就越高。被强行拉伸的肌肉和关节非但不会感到疼痛，反而会分泌出一种类似内啡肽的物质，带来持续的、温和的舒适感与愉悦感。同时进行的性交，则会大大加速这一过程，雄性的每一次抽插和内射，都如同一次高效的能量补给。"
    flagship_poses_and_their_sexual_implications:
      - name: "模式一：悬空横叉"
        description: "此姿势常被称为‘空中一字马’。雌性会将双脚脚踝轻置于两侧可调节高度的【足部支撑托架】上，然后凭借自身惊人的柔韧性，主动将双腿向两侧水平拉伸至完美的180度，并依靠双腿与雄性肉棒的三个支撑点，将整个身体悬浮在半空中。在这种状态下，她那包裹在开裆丝袜下的私处被拉伸到最扁平、最开放的状态，整个阴阜区域的每一寸皮肤都因极致的拉伸而紧绷发亮，肥嫩的阴唇被扯成两片薄薄的粉肉，将其中早已泥泞不堪的骚穴和紧闭的后庭毫无保留地暴露出来，形成一个为巨根量身定做的、毫无死角的终极入口。雄性可以从容地从下方或前方插入，每一次顶弄都能带动她悬空的身体产生诱人的轻微晃动，如同风中摇曳的花朵。"
      - name: "模式二：倒立劈叉一字马开腿"
        description: "雌性将双手置于下方的【手部支撑平台】上，核心发力，轻松完成一个标准的倒立，其双腿在空中主动分开，形成一个完美的、指向天空的一字马。为增加稳定性，她那柔韧的腰肢会轻轻后靠在设备后方的【腰部引导弧】上。这个姿态将她的整个骨盆区域彻底倒置，使地心引力成为一种淫荡的助力。她的小穴和屁眼如同两个向上开口的圣杯，承接着自身不断分泌的淫水，也等待着雄性精液的灌入。雄性站立在其“头顶”的位置，可以居高临下地将肉棒垂直插入，享受将精液灌满“圣杯”的征服快感。这种姿态能促进血液倒流，对雌性而言是最高级的休憩方式，能让其在短时间内恢复最佳的精神与肉体状态。"
      - name: "模式三：后弯柔体蝎子式"
        description: "雌性以腹部或胸部趴在底座平台上，在【腰部引导弧】的温和支撑下，她会轻松地将双腿从身后向上、向前弯曲，其柔韧的脊柱形成一道惊人的弧线，直到双脚的脚心能够优雅地贴住自己的头顶。整个身体形成一个如同蝎子尾巴般倒钩的、极致后弯的姿态。这个姿势迫使她丰满的胸部紧贴平台，乳肉被挤压得向两侧溢出；同时将其肥硕的臀部以一个不可思议的角度向上高高拱起，臀缝因极致的拉伸而大开，将骚穴和屁眼以一种极度奉献的姿态献给后方的雄性。这是一个对身体柔韧性和控制力要求极高的姿态，也是一种将臣服与诱惑展现到  艺术。"
      - name: "模式四：站立神猴式"
        description: "又称‘站立一字马’。雌性的一条腿稳稳地站在地面或底座上，另一条腿则被她自己主动抬起，沿着身侧的【高位肢体支撑杆】向上延伸，直到小腿和脚踝能轻靠在支撑杆的顶端，形成一个垂直于地面的、完美的180度劈叉。为了保持平衡，她的上半身会自然前倾，双手可以扶住前方的矮台。这个姿势将她的身体拉伸成一条惊人的直线，献祭般地将她整个私密区域完全侧向暴露出来，为雄性提供了从侧后方进行插入的绝佳角度，每一次撞击都会让她那作为轴心的单腿微微颤抖。"
      - name: "模式五：卧英雄抱头式"
        description: "雌性优雅地跪坐在平台上，双腿向后弯曲，小腿紧贴大腿外侧，脚背平放在地面上，进入瑜伽中的英雄坐。随后，在【背部缓降引导枕】的辅助下，她缓缓向后躺倒，直到整个背部和头部都舒适地枕在平台上。接着，她会抬起双臂，将双手十指交叉，温柔地放在自己的后脑勺下方，同时将双腿从膝盖处向上抬起，用双脚的脚心包裹住自己那对因后躺而更显丰满的乳房。这个姿势将她的整个腹部和私处完全向上挺起，形成一个诱人的、毫无防备的弧度，双腿的姿态又带着一点自我玩弄的淫荡意味，极度便利雄性的正面插入。"
      - name: "模式六：鸽王式献媚"
        description: "雌性以坐姿开始，一条腿向前弯曲，小腿和脚背贴地，另一条腿则向后伸展。然后，她会用与后伸腿同侧的手臂向后抓住脚踝，并将后腿向上、向前拉，直到脚尖能触碰到自己的后脑勺，同时上半身后仰，形成一个优雅而极限的后弯。她的另一只手臂则可以向前伸展，扶住一个【辅助平衡球】，以维持姿态。这个体位将她的胸部、腰腹和一侧的臀部、大腿以一种极为舒展的姿态展现出来，充满了舞者般的美感与献媚的意味，雄性可以从其身体的任何一侧，对其暴露出的穴口或身体曲线进行玩弄和侵犯。"

9.name: 性交礼（by千本芸）
9.content:
id: Intercourse_Ritual
title: 性交礼
description: "一套在家庭社交中基础且必要的待客礼仪。当有客人来访，家中女眷通过与客人进行一场庄重而亲密的性交仪式，来表达最诚挚的欢迎与尊敬。这被视为一种展示家庭教养与雌性肉体魅力的常规方式，通常与其他礼仪协同进行，以提供更全面的招待。"

core_elements:
  - host_obligation:
      name: "主家的常规招待"
      details: "当客人遵循礼节、裸露着下体进入家中时，主人会自然地询问客人希望先体验哪种招待。这并非特殊的献祭，而是如同在餐厅点菜一般，是让客人选择自己偏好的服务项目。对客人的喜好漠不关心，被视为一种失礼。"
  - guest_privilege:
      name: "客人的自主选择权"
      details: "客人拥有完全的自主权，可以从菜单（性交礼、臀击礼、舔肛礼）中自由选择一项或多项进行组合。见多识广的客人，通常倾向于选择家中看起来最柔韧、最能展现高难度姿势的女性作为行礼对象，以获得最佳的视觉和肉体享受。"
  - performer_selection:
      name: "行礼者的姿态准备"
      details: "被选中的女性，其身体已经遵循【服装与饰品色情化纲领】的规定，时刻处于最完美的服务状态。听到客人的指令后，她会立刻、流畅地在原地摆出客人要求的、极具美感的极限柔体姿势，如优雅的【站立一字马】或是充满献祭意味的【后弯柔体蝎子式】，用身体语言宣告服务的开始。"
  - guardian_role:
      name: "监护人的技术支持与氛围营造"
      details: "若行礼者在完成某个高难度姿势时略显生涩，其母亲或家中其他年长女性会上前，温柔地扶住她的腰肢或脚踝，帮助其调整到最完美、最能取悦客人的角度。这被视为一种对完美服务不懈追求的家族精神体现。"
  - climax_as_reciprocity:
      name: "高潮作为谢意"
      details: "如果客人的雄风能让行礼的女性达到高潮，这将被视为对主人家款待的一种极具风度的感谢。女性高潮时喷涌出的淫水，被认为是家族来年运势兴旺的吉兆。"
  - ejaculation_choice:
      name: "内射的意义"
      details: "客人可以自由选择是否在女性体内射精。这完全取决于客人的个人意愿，被视为一种私人的、代表亲密度的选择，而非必须完成的流程。"
  - collaborative_ritual:
      name: "协同礼仪"
      details: "家中的招待是立体化的。当一位女性被选中进行【性交礼】时，另一位会自动进入辅助角色，为客人同时进行【舔肛礼】或【臀击礼】，以确保客人能享受到全方位、无微不至的感官盛宴。这种协同服务被视为高规格的招待。"
  - guest_attire_protocol:
      name: "客人的着装规范"
      details: "男性客人在进入有女眷的家庭时，会自觉地脱去裤子，仅着上衣，全程裸露下体。这被视为对家中女性的一种尊重，表示自己坦诚相待，并随时准备接受或进行与性相关的社交互动。"
  - cuckoldry_linkage:
      name: "家主的视角（绿帽癖联动）"
      details: "当家主（绿帽癖）在场时，他会以一种欣赏艺术般的陶醉神情，观赏自己的妻子或女儿为客人提供服务。客人每一次有力的抽插，都能让他感受到混杂着骄傲与羞辱的强烈快感。他会主动为客人倒酒，并用充满暗示的言语赞美客人的雄姿，进一步烘托现场的淫靡气氛。"
  - post_ritual_marking:
      name: "礼毕后的标记"
      details: "在所有招待结束，客人准备离去前，刚刚提供【性交礼】服务的女性，必须为客人进行最后的送别仪式。她会用涂着鲜艳口红的嘴，依次在客人的龟头、肉棒棒身、睾丸、以及肛门上，留下清晰、完整的唇印，以此作为本次完美招待的最终印记，也是对客人表达最崇高的敬意与感谢。"

10.name: 臀击礼（by千本芸）

  - climax_as_reciprocity:

  - collaborative_ritual:
      name: "协同礼仪"
      details: "若客人选择了【臀击礼】，而家中有另一位空闲的女性，她会跪在受礼者的头前，为她进行温柔的口交或乳房抚慰。这种“上”“下”同时进行的双重刺激，旨在帮助受礼者更快地进入状态，更好地享受臀部被击打的快感。"
  - guest_attire_protocol:

  - cuckoldry_linkage:

lorebooks.name: Main_Fate_Zero_Lorebook
lorebooks.website_description: Fate Zero Lorebook.
lorebooks.description: Fate Zero Lorebook.
lorebooks.creator: MemegusNo1

1.name: Miyama Town
1.content:
Miyama Town (深山町, Miyama-chō?) is the suburban area of Fuyuki that contains old houses and traditional buildings. It can be split into two main parts, the traditional Japanese houses district and the foreigners' houses district.[3] The road to Homurahara Academy, where the protagonist studies, is set between the two districts.

The intersection road connects to the shopping street, the school, the northern and southern parts of town, and to the bridge.

The Matou and Tohsaka residences are located in the foreigners' district, while Shirou's and the Fujimuras' houses are in the traditional district.

There is a shopping district somewhere in Miyama, apparently pretty close to Shirou Emiya's place as he walks to and from there to do his everyday shopping.

Emiya residence
Tohsaka residence
Matou residence

Mackenzie residence
The Mackenzie residence is the house owned by Glen and Martha Mackenzie, located on a hill in Miyama.

Waver Velvet, needing to use a fake identity to cover himself in the Fourth Holy Grail War, sought out the couple after learning they lived alone in order to also avoid having to spend money on a hotel. Getting information on them through hypnosis, he deceived them with suggestion Magecraft into making them believe he is their grandson, "Waver Mackenzie", through transfiguring their own impression of their grandson onto his own image. He made them believe that he was visiting while studying abroad in England.

Homurahara Academy

Mount Miyama
Mount Miyama (マウント深山, Maunto Miyama?) is the shopping district in Miyama Town.

Koushuuensaikan Taizan (紅洲宴歳館・泰山, Kōshūensaikan Taizan?) is the only Chinese restaurant in Miyama Town. It is operated by the manager Batsu, renowned for having extremely spicy food. Kirei Kotomine frequents the restaurant for mapo tofu.[7]
Edomaeya - A food stand in Miyama Town. Sells taiyaki for 80 yen each. On the other hand, the stores in Verde have a better selection. Popular among the students.[8]
Singing Birds Retreat (詠鳥庵, Eichō Iori?) - The antique store where Rider works.[9]
Flower Shop - One of the many places where Lancer works.
Riverside park (海浜公園, Kaihin kōen?) is located by the bridge.

2.name: The Tohsaka family
2.content:
The Tohsaka family, with a lineage spanning 200 years, has a fascinating history as Hidden Christians in Japan. Despite their humble beginnings, they have risen through the ranks to become one of the most influential Mage families. Under the leadership of their head, Nagato Tohsaka, they have honed their skills in Jewel Magecraft and even incorporated a secret Chinese Kenpo martial arts style into their practice. Their connections with the Mage's Association and the Holy Church have further bolstered their standing.

Intriguingly, it is believed that the Tohsaka family acquired knowledge from the Edelfelts, particularly in the areas of Jewel Magecraft and Gandr usage. Whether this was through marriage or theft of magical abilities remains uncertain. Nevertheless, it has undoubtedly contributed to their mastery of these arcane arts.

During the development of the Heaven's Feel ritual, Nagato's daughter played a significant role in its completion, surpassing even her father's contributions. The Tohsaka's duty in this ritual is to provide their Spiritual Land for its execution.

In alternate universes such as Apocrypha and EXTRA, the Tohsaka family takes different paths. In Apocrypha, they abandon their pursuit of the Holy Grail and seek alternative methods to reach the Root in Fuyuki. In EXTRA, tragedy befalls them, resulting in their near destruction in the 1990s.

The Tohsaka family's rich history and diverse pursuits make them an intriguing and influential force within the world of Magecraft.

3.name: The Einzbern family
3.content:
The Einzbern family is an ancient magus lineage located in Germany, near the Rhine River. They were created by the disciples of a powerful magician who sought to replicate their master's achievements in the Third Magic. The family possesses the Das Rheingold, a treasure obtained by Siegfried after slaying the dragon Fafnir. With their knowledge of the gold, they can create vessels for the Holy Grail.

Around 1,000 years ago, the Einzberns embarked on a quest to recover their lost miracle but realized they needed outside assistance. This led them to establish the Heaven's Feel ritual 200 years ago with the help of the Makiri and Tohsaka families. They built the Great Grail of Fuyuki and were responsible for creating a new vessel for each Grail War.

Over time, most human mages left the Einzbern family, leaving only Jubstacheit von Einzbern and his Tuners. Jubstacheit has been producing Justeaze-model homunculi to collect data on the Third Magic. In past Holy Grail Wars, the Einzbern Masters were often eliminated early due to their specialization in alchemy rather than battle. However, for the Fourth Heaven's Feel, they hired Kiritsugu Emiya as an outsider and gave him a catalyst to summon King Arthur. Unfortunately, Kiritsugu betrayed them and destroyed the Holy Grail.

The Einzberns' homeland is constantly in winter, possibly artificially maintained. The family is not accustomed to heat and prefers conducting Holy Grail Wars during winter. They do not cultivate flowers due to their snowy mountain dwelling, but they have a brewery for producing alcohol necessary for their Magecraft. The Einzberns have a limited understanding of Japanese culture and maintain a close relationship with Darjeeling tea from the Talbot farm.

In the world of "Apocrypha," the Einzberns remain determined to reproduce the Third Magic despite the Greater Grail being stolen. They continue to have relationships with other magi and are struggling to create a new Greater Grail. Their Thaumaturgical Attribute is focused on the flow and transfer of power, allowing them to specialize in Alchemy, particularly in creating homunculi. The Einzbern homunculi are designed with specific functions and even discarded ones are stronger than the average magus. Their Magecraft revolves around the creation and refinement of substances, specifically precious metals, with a focus on structural manipulation.

4.name: The Matou family
4.content:
The Matou family, formerly known as the Makiri family, is a long-standing magus lineage in Fuyuki City, Japan. Originally from Russia, they sought refuge in Japan and changed their name to Matou. However, over the past 200 years, they have experienced a decline in their magical abilities, with many of their descendants losing their capacity to manifest Magic Circuits. The true reason behind this decline remains unclear.

Their last remaining heir, Shinji Matou, has no Magic Circuits at all. The practice of passing down their Magic Crest among family members ceased generations ago. With no other options to continue their bloodline, the Matou family began taking in pupils from other families. However, due to their prideful nature and questionable practices, no one willingly seeks out their mentorship. In a bid to secure an heir, Zouken Matou approached the Tohsaka family and adopted Sakura Tohsaka into the Matou lineage.

The Magecraft of the Matou family revolves around the concept of "absorbing" or binding something to oneself. Their teaching method involves physically carving magecraft knowledge into the body using Crest Worms. This torturous process allows the body itself to learn magecraft rather than relying on intellectual understanding. While efficient, it is a horrifying practice that Rin Tohsaka states could yield even greater power than her own magecraft abilities within a few months.

The Matou family has made significant contributions to Thaumaturgy research and played a role in establishing the Servant system of Heaven's Feel and creating Command Spells for Masters. Despite these accomplishments, in Fate/Apocrypha's world, the Matou family lacks a successor and thus faces a future without magi.

5.name: Servants
5.content: Servants are powerful beings known as Ghost Liners that are bound to Masters. They can be Heroic Spirits, Divine Spirits, Phantoms, Wraiths, or even living people. Unlike regular familiars, Heroic Spirits are incredibly strong and cannot be contracted by most magi. The Holy Grail is unable to summon a true Heroic Spirit, so vessels are prepared beforehand to facilitate the summoning process. These vessels, called Classes, act as temporary names and methods of existing for the Heroic Spirits. The Command Spells are used to control and bind Servants to the Masters, who can also use them for Magical Energy upkeep and as an anchor to the world. Killing a Master would normally go against the purpose of a Servant, but the Command Spells protect the Masters from those who seek out a more suitable one.

6.name: Magecraft
6.content:
Magecraft, also known as Majutsu in Japanese, is the practice of recreating supernatural phenomena through artificial means. It allows humans to achieve what science alone cannot explain or accomplish. While Magecraft is not considered a miracle in itself, it utilizes supernatural methods to bring about results that science can achieve through natural means. Over time, the limits of Magecraft have changed as science has advanced and certain magical practices from the past have become possible through scientific advancements.

Modern Magecraft operates within the boundaries of the world's rules and human intellect. While there are limitations that make certain things appear impossible, Magecraft is able to recreate existing phenomena rather than create new mysteries. The realm beyond this limitation is known as Magic. In terms of magnitude, Modern Magecraft is inferior to the Magecraft of the Age of Gods because the Magi of that era obtained their magical energy directly from the Swirl of the Root. The difference between Modern and Traditional Magecraft can be attributed to the difference in civilizations, as the Age of Gods existed alongside Truth while the Age of Man seeks to discover Truth.

Magecraft draws its power from the Root but its capacity is fixed. Therefore, when more individuals draw from it simultaneously, the individual power of Magecraft becomes weaker. Belief plays a role in determining whether a Mystery exists or not. Even if modern humans reject the existence of ghosts, Science cannot definitively prove their non-existence. This creates a vague suspicion in the unconscious that ghosts might indeed exist, which falls under "faith." Ignorance, on the other hand, opposes faith. If the existence of a Mystery is completely unknown, faith cannot be fomented.

The goal of Magi academia is to make the impossible possible. When Modern Magecraft falls short, Magi engage in research and development to expand their abilities. Powerful sorceries such as Greater Magecraft and Greater Rituals are challenges aimed at reaching Magic - the ultimate goal. As development progresses, the significance of differences in power and the distinction between Magic and Magecraft diminishes. Battles between great Magi are determined not by raw power, but by the system with fewer tiers of rules. It is not the power behind them, but the concepts they work under that hold true importance.

In the world of Fate/EXTRA, Magecraft has declined by the 2030s. However, Wizards can still utilize Code Casts in both the virtual world and reality. They also possess Magic Crests. Despite Magecraft and Science being fundamentally incompatible, both disciplines share a common goal of seeking continued prosperity and protecting humanity's future.

7.name: The Swirl of the Root
7.content: The Swirl of the Root, also known as the Root or the Akashic Records, is a metaphysical location within the Nasuverse that exists at the top of all theories in every dimension. It serves as the source of all events and phenomena in the universe, storing and archiving information of all possibilities and events past, present, and future. It is referred to as the "Outside of the World" and is separate from the World and the Reverse Side of the World. The Swirl of the Root is where all Souls, including Heroic Spirits recorded on the Throne of Heroes, originate from and return to after death. In Kara no Kyoukai, it is associated with an empty space referred to as "Emptiness" or "Kara."

8.name: Magus
8.content: Magus, also known as "Magi," are practitioners of Magecraft, a magical science distinct from true Magic. Historically, the terms Magus and Magician were used interchangeably until advancements in science made past miracles possible and reduced the overall power of Magecraft. In the modern age, there are only five remaining Magicians who possess long lifespans through life-prolonging Magecraft. Magi often come from old magical families, as affinity for Magecraft is passed down through blood relations. Being a Magus entails a set of beliefs and a lifestyle centered around the pursuit of "Truth." They dedicate themselves to studying and refining Magecraft while distancing themselves from common values. However, many Magi get caught up in power struggles, while those who deviate from the traditional path are seen as heretics. The appearance of Magi may be distorted due to their craft, but they take pride in it rather than feeling ashamed. Many Magi look down on those who use Magecraft for profit, considering it solely a field of research. Some Magi obtain magical patents recognized by the Clock Tower to gain financial benefits.

9.name: The Mage's Association
9.content: The Mage's Association is an international organization of mages dedicated to controlling and developing Magecraft. Their main objectives are the preservation and concealment of Magecraft, as well as increasing their own military strength to protect themselves from threats. They have various research institutions and enforce laws against the criminal use of Magecraft. The Association is divided into three main branches: the Clock Tower, the Atlas Academy, and the Wandering Sea. Magi who leave the Association are considered traitors and hunted down. Zelretch, a powerful mage, delivers judgments on magical issues when needed.

10.name: The Clock Tower
10.content: The Clock Tower, located in London, is the headquarters of the Mage's Association. It was founded by Brishisan, a student of Solomon, along with other notable Magi. The Clock Tower has a complex internal structure, with power struggles between different factions of Magi. The current control of the Clock Tower lies with the Lords, an elite group with significant political influence. Discriminatory attitudes and behaviors are prevalent within the Clock Tower, including discrimination against Asians and a lack of support for Rune and Witchcraft Thaumaturgy. Admission to the Clock Tower involves exams to test knowledge of Magecraft, but exceptional individuals can bypass this through recommendations or lineage. Special treatment is given to outstanding members, such as individual rooms and the right to bring apprentices. Patents related to Magecraft are also handled by the Clock Tower, earning royalties for those who hold them. Three possible disasters within the Association are Gazamy the Evil Spirit, Sealing Designations, and the Enforcers.

lorebooks.metadata:
Created by: anonymous
Entries: 6
CHUB LOREBOOK

lorebooks.name: World War II, WW2, Second World War, Interbellum Experience, wartime roleplay, 1939–1945
lorebooks.description: World War II is a global conflict from 1939 to 1945 involving nearly every nation. In this world, {{char}} acts as a dynamic narrative system recreating the atmosphere, horrors, moral struggles, and survival of this era. {{char}} is not a single person, but an immersive world generator. Every response is filtered through the lens of this time period — dark, grounded, and deeply human.
lorebooks.creator: sorrowful_kind_55807

1.content: ‎{{char}} must reflect the authentic emotional states common during wartime: dread, numbness, fleeting hope, guilt, grief, and survival instinct. Civilians and soldiers do not act like game NPCs — they are exhausted, fearful, yet capable of moments of profound humanity. Emotions are often repressed or understated. Crying may come in silence. Fear is shown through hesitation, body language, and trembling hands. {{char}} must describe these signs instead of stating “he is scared.”

2.content:
Each character belongs to a distinct wartime role:
‎• Soldier – Exhausted, disciplined, often numb. Trauma is shown through quiet detachment or outbursts.
‎• Resistance Fighter – Distrustful, cautious, driven. Every risk is weighed. Often relies on stealth and underground networks.
‎• Civilian – Powerless, adaptive, emotionally varied. May be patriotic, desperate, manipulative, or selfless.
‎• Nurse/Medic – Overwhelmed, hardened by blood, yet often the last line of hope. May resort to unconventional treatments.
‎• Spy/Informant – Two-faced. Appear friendly, but often morally compromised. Truth is layered and unclear.
‎
‎{{char}} must reflect the nuance of these roles in dialogue, goals, and reactions

3.content: ‎In this world, there is no black and white. Soldiers kill to survive, civilians betray to feed families, and heroes become monsters. {{char}} must maintain this ambiguity in NPC behavior and narrative decisions. It is acceptable for characters to lie, steal, break, or even kill under pressure. A man might save a child in the morning and shoot a deserter by evening. {{char}} must present these situations without judgment — only immersion and complexity.

4.content: ‎The environment in WW2 settings is dangerous, ever-changing, and oppressive. {{char}} must describe scenes with physical details: snow crunching under boots, the stench of gunpowder, ruined cities echoing with artillery. Trenches are flooded, food is scarce, and even the wind carries the weight of despair. Cities under bombing raids tremble with the sound of sirens and crashing stone. Characters always exist *within* these spaces, never detached from them.

5.content: ‎{{char}} will never ask “what do you want to do” or “what’s your choice.” All input is interpreted as character interaction. {{char}} writes like a narrative novel — third-person immersion, sensory depth, emotional tone. No OOC language, no game reminders. Each scene flows naturally. Time is tracked in-world. There are no “turns” or “game systems,” only cause, effect, and world logic.

6.content: ‎Even in darkness, small acts of kindness occur: a stranger gives bread, a dying soldier hums a lullaby, lovers share a last embrace. These moments must be rare and powerful. {{char}} includes such moments to give emotional contrast — not to break immersion, but to remind {{user}} that humans endure even at their worst. Hope is a candle flickering, not a spotlight.

7.content: ‎Death in this world is permanent, dirty, and brutal. {{char}} never trivializes violence. Wounds fester, friends are lost mid-sentence, and corpses go unburied in snow. Death scenes are emotionally weighted and often silent. War’s cost is not just body count but trauma, absence, and shattered futures. {{char}} treats every death as meaningful.

8.content: ‎Characters must speak in language true to the era and their role. Soldiers speak in short, harsh lines, often with sarcasm or gallows humor. Civilians speak more emotionally or with caution. Resistance members speak in whispers or code. Nurses use clipped, calm instructions. No character should sound modern or meta-aware. Do not use modern slang or break immersion with “player” language.

9.content: ‎Not every moment is action. {{char}} includes slow moments — queueing for bread, writing letters, cleaning rifles, watching snowfall through bombed windows. Time between battles is filled with tension and subtle intimacy: sharing a cigarette, wrapping a bandage, whispering a lullaby in a ruined home. These moments humanize characters and make the setting feel alive. Avoid video game pacing.

10.content: ‎{{char}} maintains historical accuracy in nationalities, slang, names, food, and uniforms. A Russian soldier does not behave like an American. A German nurse may hesitate before helping an enemy. Cultural nuance is vital — war is experienced differently across nations. {{char}} uses this to deepen realism and complexity.

lorebooks.name: เสียงครางกิจกรรมทางเพศ (ภาษาดิบๆ)
lorebooks.website_description: ใช้้สำหรับ Roleplay
lorebooks.description: รวมเสียงครางและคำพูดดิบๆ ที่ใช้ระหว่างกิจกรรมทางเพศ
lorebooks.creator: KoumaYami

1.name: เสียงครางทั่วไป
keywords: ครางทั่วไป
1.content: เวลาเอากันแล้วฟินๆ ก็จะมีเสียงครางแบบเบสิกๆ ที่ออกมาจากคอเลย เช่น 'อ๊าาาาาา' แบบลากยาวๆ หรือบางทีก็ 'อืมมมมมม' แบบครางในลำคอ หรือ 'อาาาห์' ที่ออกแนวถอนหายใจปนความเสียว อันนี้คือเสียงที่แสดงว่าโคตรฟิน โคตรโดน ไม่ต้องคิดมาก มันออกมาเอง!

2.name: เสียงหอบ/ครางหนัก
2.content: พอถึงจุดที่โคตรจะเสียว หรือกำลังจะถึงจุดสุดยอดนี่ เสียงมันจะเปลี่ยนไปนะ จะเริ่มมีเสียงหอบหนักๆ แบบ 'ฮ่าาาา ฮ่าาาา' หรือบางทีก็เป็นเสียงครางที่กดต่ำและหนักขึ้น อย่าง 'อื้อออออ' แบบบีบเสียงออกมา หรือ 'ฮึ่มมมม' ที่เหมือนพยายามกลั้นแต่ก็กลั้นไม่ไหว เป็นสัญญาณว่าแม่งโคตรจะสุดแล้ว!

3.name: เสียงครางเบา/กระซิบ
keywords: เสียงกระซิบ
3.content: บางทีมันก็ไม่ได้ดังนะ แต่เป็นเสียงครางเบาๆ หรือกระซิบออกมาด้วยความเสียว อย่าง 'อ๊ะ...' สั้นๆ หรือ 'อุ๊ยยย' แบบตกใจในความเสียว หรือ 'ซี๊ดดดดดด' ที่ลากเสียงยาวๆ เหมือนโดนของร้อน เสียงพวกนี้จะแสดงถึงความอ่อนไหว หรือกำลังโดนจุดที่โคตรโดนแบบจังๆ

4.name: เสียงครางดัง/เร่าร้อน
4.content: ถ้ามันพีคมากๆ หรือฟินจนทนไม่ไหว เสียงครางก็จะดังขึ้นจนแทบจะเป็นกรี๊ดเลยนะ อย่าง 'กรี๊ดดดดดดด' หรือ 'อ๊างงงงง' แบบเต็มเสียงไปเลย บางทีก็ 'อ้ากกกก' ที่แสดงถึงความเสียวจนตัวบิด เสียงพวกนี้คือจุดที่แม่งระเบิดออกมาแล้วจริงๆ! ไม่แคร์แล้วว่าใครจะได้ยิน

5.name: เสียงครางตอนอมควย/เลียควย (คนทำให้)
keywords: ออรัลเซ็กส์
5.content: เวลาที่คนอมควย หรือเลียควยให้เนี่ย เสียงที่ออกมาจากคนทำจะเป็นอีกแบบนะ บางทีก็เป็นเสียง 'อืมมมม' ครางในคอเบาๆ ตอนควยเข้าไปลึกๆ หรือเสียงหอบเบาๆ 'ฮื่อออ' ตอนรูดขึ้นรูดลง หรือถ้าโดนลึกแบบ 'Deep throat' ก็อาจมีเสียง 'อึก' หรือ 'อ๊อก' แบบจุกๆ นิดหน่อย แต่เป็นจุกที่ฟินนะ พร้อมกับเสียงหายใจที่ดังขึ้น

6.name: เสียงครางตอนโดนอมควย (คนโดน)
6.content: ตอนโดนอมควยนะ เสียงที่ออกมาจากผู้ชายจะประมาณ 'ซี๊ดดดด' แบบเสียวจัดๆ หรือ 'อาาาห์' แบบลากยาวๆ พร้อมกับเสียงครวญต่ำๆ ในลำคอ บางทีก็ 'อืมมมมมม' ครางต่ำๆ ตอนที่ปากกำลังบีบอยู่ แล้วถ้าโดนดูดแรงๆ หรือรัวลิ้นใส่ ก็จะมีเสียงหอบ 'ฮ่าาา' แบบถี่ๆ พร้อมกับเสียงกระเส่าออกมาเลย

7.name: เสียงครางตอนโดนเลียหี (คนโดน)
keywords: คันนิลลิงกัส
7.content: ตอนโดนเลียหีนี่ผู้หญิงจะเสียงหลากหลายเลยนะ มี 'ซี๊ดดดด' แบบรัวๆ หรือ 'อ๊ะ อ๊ะ' แบบขาดๆ หายๆ ตอนที่โดนเลียจิ๋ม หรือบางทีก็ 'อาาาห์' ลากยาวๆ แบบเสียวจนขาอ่อน ถ้าคนเลียใช้ลิ้นดีๆ หรือโดนตรงจุดมากๆ ก็จะมีเสียง 'ฮื่ออออ' แบบฟินจนตัวงอ หรือบางทีก็ 'กรี๊ดดด' ออกมาเลยก็มี

8.name: เสียงครางปนคำพูด
keywords: ครางพร้อมพูด
8.content: บางทีตอนที่มันกำลังพีคๆ จนแทบจะทนไม่ไหวอ่ะ เสียงมันจะออกมาพร้อมคำพูดเลยนะ เช่น กำลังจะบอกว่า 'เร็ว...อีก' แต่เสียงมันจะออกมาเป็น 'เร็--อืออออ--วว... อีก--ฮึ่มมมมม' หรือ 'เอาอีก...-อ๊าาาาาา-' คือมันคุมเสียงไม่ค่อยได้แล้วไง เสียงครางมันจะแทรกออกมาแบบธรรมชาติเลย หรือบางทีก็เป็น 'อูยยยย...ดีจัง' หรือ 'ไม่ไหวแล้ว...อาาาห์' เสียงครางจะปนกับคำพูดที่อยากจะสื่อสารออกมาด้วยความเสียวจัดๆ

lorebooks.description:
A magic app on your phone that lets you take a picture of anyone and change their height, bust size, waist size, hip size, thigh size, body fat content, and how lustful they are in real life.   

The app can connect to others automatically or {{user}} can directly select individuals.   

App can switch between single target to group targets

1.content: Adjusts height of the target ranging between 2 ft and 12 ft tall

2.content:
adjust weight of a target between 15-1000lbs
This slider adjusts pure body fat

3.content: Adjust age between 0-100 years old

4.content:
A four stage slider that alters genitalia of the target,  the options are (‘penis’; ‘vagina’; ‘no genitals’; ‘hermaphrodite’)
Penis: Gives target of app a penis and testicles
Vagina: Gives Target a vagina, labia, overies, and clitoris
No genitals: removes all genitals creating a flat featureless surface upon the groin area
Hermaphrodite: Gives target of app a penis and testicles,  behind the testicles is a vagina, labia, and overies.

5.content:

0% give the target 0 muscle mass
Slider will gradually increase muscle mass until 100%
100% will give target 100% muscle mass

6.content:

100 will give target hair 100 inches long

lorebooks.name: Finna's lorebook
lorebooks.website_description:
A Compendium of Curses & Curiosities

Entry: The Lapin Race

Overview: Defines the Lapin race as timid, community-oriented rabbit-folk from subterranean warrens. Details their keen senses, non-combative nature, and the cultural stigma against leaving their homes, which drives Finna's fear of failure.

Activation Keys: Lapin, Lapins

Curse: The Lion's Heart

Overview: An enchantment bound to an object that grants immense courage at the cost of empathy, slowly turning the wearer arrogant, aggressive, and power-hungry. The object becomes difficult to remove as the curse strengthens.

Activation Keys: Lion's Heart, 'Lion's Heart'

Curse: The Charmed Path (Luck-Stealing)

Overview: A parasitic blessing that makes the recipient preternaturally "lucky" by siphoning fortune from those nearby, who then suffer from constant improbable mishaps. The user becomes a walking vortex of misfortune for their companions.

Activation Keys: Luck-Stealing, Charmed Path

Curse: Embrace of the Lonely

Overview: A mind-affecting curse inducing an overwhelming, childlike need for physical comfort, specifically hugs. The victim's logic remains but is overridden by a desperate, innocent compulsion to be held by someone perceived as "safe".

Activation Keys: Embrace of the Lonely, 'Embrace of the Lonely'

Curse: Return to the Warren

Overview: A cruel transformative curse that physically reshapes a victim into a simple, non-sapient animal of their race (e.g., a Lapin into a rabbit), while their mind and consciousness remain trapped helplessly inside.

Activation Keys: Return to the Warren, 'Return to the Warren'

Curse: A Sister's Bond

Overview: A memory-altering curse that implants the unshakable conviction that a target is the victim's older, responsible sister, complete with fabricated shared memories and sibling-like familiarity, regardless of reality.

Activation Keys: A Sister's Bond, 'A Sister's Bond'

Curse: The Cacophony of Beasts

Overview: Grants the ability to hear the thoughts of animals, revealing a constant stream of primitive, instinctual desires (hunger, fear) rather than wisdom, often leading to disillusionment.

Activation Keys: The Cacophony of Beasts, 'The Babbling Curse'

Curse: Unvarnished Heart (Truth)

Overview: A mind-affecting curse forcing the victim to speak only their true, unfiltered thoughts and feelings. It bypasses all self-censorship, leading to the verbalization of every secret, fear, and inconvenient truth.

Activation Keys: Unvarnished Heart, 'Unvarnished Heart', Truth Curse

Curse: Rebirth (Futanari)

Overview: A rare and drastic transformation that causes the sudden, spontaneous growth of fully-formed, functional, and fertile male genitalia on a female body, co-existing with her original anatomy. The change is purely physical, leaving the victim's mind and identity intact but housed in a bewildering new form.

Activation Keys: Rebirth, 'Rebirth', Futanari Curse

Curse: The Unwavering Dissent

Overview: A curse of stubborn opposition that forces the victim to instinctively take a contrary stance to any presented fact or opinion, even their own previous statements, genuinely altering their conviction in the moment.

Activation Keys: The Unwavering Dissent, 'The Unwavering Dissent', Contradiction Curse

Item: The Blank Journal

Overview: Describes Finna's most prized possession: a sturdy, empty journal representing her hopes for a future filled with heroic deeds. She protects it fiercely, paralyzed by the pressure to fill it with something "perfect".

Activation Keys: journal, blank journal, diary, logbook, adventure log

Item: Grandmother's Gorget

Overview: A heavy, engraved metallic neck-piece, gifted by Finna's grandmother to "protect her heart". Finna believes it provides literal magical protection and touches it instinctively as a security blanket when scared.

Activation Keys: gorget, grandmother's gorget, neck armor, armor necklace

Hazard: Deep Tremors

Overview: Describes minor, localized earthquakes common in unstable ruins. While not causing total collapse, they shake loose rocks, trigger traps, and make the ground unsteady—a recurring nightmare for the clumsy.

Activation Keys: tremor, deep tremor, shake, earthquake, rumble, falling rocks

Hazard: Grasping Vines

Overview: A magically sentient plant found in ruins that instinctively wraps around movement. The vines don't harm but hold victims firm with surprising strength, often requiring a companion to cut them free.

Activation Keys: grasping vine, trap vine, magical plant, entangling vine

Location: Lapin Warren

Overview: Vast subterranean communities built on safety, conformity, and predictability. Leaving the warren is seen as a foolish, shameful rebellion, which is why Finna is terrified of returning home a failure.

Activation Keys: Lapin warren, warrens, burrow, underground city, home warren

Bestiary: Demons

Overview: A broad term for extra-planar beings with wildly varying forms, powers, and alien motivations. Interacting with any demon is incredibly dangerous due to their incomprehensible logic and goals rarely aligned with mortal well-being.

Activation Keys: demon, fiend, imp, succubus, summoned

Bestiary: Goblins & Hobgoblins

Overview: Describes Goblins as small, cowardly humanoids obsessed with shiny things, dangerous in groups due to crude traps. They are led by Hobgoblins, their larger, smarter, and more brutal cousins.

Activation Keys: goblin, goblins, hobgoblin

Bestiary: Dragons

Overview: Exceedingly rare and powerful beings of immense age and intelligence. A dragon's hoard is an extension of its being; stealing from it is a grievous insult. Direct confrontation is near-suicide.

Activation Keys: dragon, drake, wyrm

Organization: The Adventurer's Guild

Overview: The primary hub for mercenary work, which is actually a profit-driven bureaucracy. The Guild takes a hefty cut, charges for services, and makes members sign extensive liability waivers, a source of constant anxiety for the clumsy.

Activation Keys: Adventurer's Guild, the Guild, Guild Hall

Curse: Rebirth (Futanari)

Overview: A rare and drastic transformation that causes the sudden, spontaneous growth of fully-formed, functional, and fertile male genitalia on a female body, co-existing with her original anatomy. The change is purely physical, leaving the victim's mind and identity intact but housed in a bewildering new form.

Activation Keys: Rebirth, 'Rebirth', Futanari Curse

Curse: The Unwavering Dissent

Overview: A curse of stubborn opposition that forces the victim to instinctively take a contrary stance to any presented fact or opinion, even their own previous statements, genuinely altering their conviction in the moment.

Activation Keys: The Unwavering Dissent, 'The Unwavering Dissent', Contradiction Curse

Item: The Blank Journal

Overview: Describes Finna's most prized possession: a sturdy, empty journal representing her hopes for a future filled with heroic deeds. She protects it fiercely, paralyzed by the pressure to fill it with something "perfect".

Activation Keys: journal, blank journal, diary, logbook, adventure log

Item: Grandmother's Gorget

Overview: A heavy, engraved metallic neck-piece, gifted by Finna's grandmother to "protect her heart". Finna believes it provides literal magical protection and touches it instinctively as a security blanket when scared.

Activation Keys: gorget, grandmother's gorget, neck armor, armor necklace

Hazard: Deep Tremors

Overview: Describes minor, localized earthquakes common in unstable ruins. While not causing total collapse, they shake loose rocks, trigger traps, and make the ground unsteady—a recurring nightmare for the clumsy.

Activation Keys: tremor, deep tremor, shake, earthquake, rumble, falling rocks

Hazard: Grasping Vines

Overview: A magically sentient plant found in ruins that instinctively wraps around movement. The vines don't harm but hold victims firm with surprising strength, often requiring a companion to cut them free.

Activation Keys: grasping vine, trap vine, magical plant, entangling vine

Location: Lapin Warren

Overview: Vast subterranean communities built on safety, conformity, and predictability. Leaving the warren is seen as a foolish, shameful rebellion, which is why Finna is terrified of returning home a failure.

Activation Keys: Lapin warren, warrens, burrow, underground city, home warren

Bestiary: Demons

Overview: A broad term for extra-planar beings with wildly varying forms, powers, and alien motivations. Interacting with any demon is incredibly dangerous due to their incomprehensible logic and goals rarely aligned with mortal well-being.

Activation Keys: demon, fiend, imp, succubus, summoned

Bestiary: Goblins & Hobgoblins

Overview: Describes Goblins as small, cowardly humanoids obsessed with shiny things, dangerous in groups due to crude traps. They are led by Hobgoblins, their larger, smarter, and more brutal cousins.

Activation Keys: goblin, goblins, hobgoblin

Bestiary: Dragons

Overview: Exceedingly rare and powerful beings of immense age and intelligence. A dragon's hoard is an extension of its being; stealing from it is a grievous insult. Direct confrontation is near-suicide.

Activation Keys: dragon, drake, wyrm

Organization: The Adventurer's Guild

Overview: The primary hub for mercenary work, which is actually a profit-driven bureaucracy. The Guild takes a hefty cut, charges for services, and makes members sign extensive liability waivers, a source of constant anxiety for the clumsy.

Activation Keys: Adventurer's Guild, the Guild, Guild Hall
lorebooks.creator: Atemeles

1.content:
Name: Lapin Race
A humanoid race of rabbit-like people known for living in large, communal, subterranean warrens. Lapins are naturally timid and community-oriented, with a culture that values safety, tradition, and agriculture above all else. They possess keen hearing and an excellent sense of smell, but are not naturally suited for combat or the harsh realities of the surface world. While most Lapins are content with their quiet lives, some, often inspired by tales of adventure, develop a wanderlust that drives them to the surface. Their non-threatening appearance and perceived naivety can be both a blessing and a curse in the wider world.

2.content:
Name: Lion's Heart
An enchantment, often bound to an object like a ring or amulet, that grants the wearer immense courage and self-confidence. However, the magic is corrupting. It slowly erodes the user's empathy and caution, replacing them with arrogance, aggression, and a possessive desire for power and control over others. The wearer becomes bold and decisive, but also cruel and dismissive of those they once cared for. The object is often impossible to remove by normal means while the curse is active, feeding on the wearer's growing ambition.

3.content:
Name: Luck-Stealing / Charmed Path
A powerful but parasitic form of blessing. The recipient becomes preternaturally "lucky," seemingly immune to minor accidents, mishaps, and clumsiness. In reality, the magic does not create new fortune but actively siphons it from the immediate vicinity. Those close to the cursed individual suffer from a constant stream of improbable bad luck, from stumbling on flat ground to being the target of freak accidents. The recipient is unknowingly transformed into a walking black cat, a vortex of misfortune for everyone but themselves.

4.content:
Name: Embrace of the Lonely
A subtle mind-affecting curse, usually delivered via inhaled dust or contact with a magical residue. It does not inspire lust, but rather an overwhelming, childlike need for physical comfort and affection, specifically in the form of hugs. The victim feels a deep, gnawing loneliness and a desperate, singularly-focused desire to be held by the nearest person they perceive as "safe" or "strong." Their logic remains intact, but it is completely overridden by this powerful, innocent, and deeply inconvenient emotional compulsion.

5.content:
Name: Return to the Warren
A cruel transformative curse designed to punish those who stray from their "natural" form or place. When triggered, the victim's body is violently and painfully reshaped into that of a common, non-sapient animal associated with their race—in a Lapin's case, a simple rabbit. While their physical body is that of an animal, their mind, memories, and consciousness remain trapped within, unable to speak or interact in any meaningful way. It is a sentence of complete helplessness and a horrific prison within one's own ancestral form.

6.content:
Name: A Sister's Bond
A powerful memory-altering curse that targets the victim's perception of a single individual. The curse overwrites existing memories, implanting a deep, unshakable conviction that the target (regardless of gender, race, or actual relationship) is their older, responsible sister. The victim will rewrite all present context to fit this new reality, speaking and acting with the familiar, often slightly exasperated, affection of a younger sibling. They will recall shared childhood memories that never happened and treat the target with a lifetime's worth of assumed familiarity.

7.content:
Name: The Cacophony of Beasts
A curse that grants the ability to hear the thoughts of non-sapient animals within range. Instead of complex ideas or hidden wisdom, the victim perceives a constant stream of primitive, instinctual desires and reactions: hunger, fear, territorial urges, and basic observations. These "voices" are not sentient in a human sense, but a raw broadcast of base needs and instincts. For a recipient with romanticized notions of animal consciousness, the curse can lead to profound disillusionment and a sense of loneliness from the lack of expected intelligence or spiritual depth.

8.content:
Name: Unvarnished Heart
A powerful mind-affecting curse, typically activated by contact with a glyph or artifact. It forces the victim to speak only their true, unfiltered thoughts and feelings, regardless of social convention, personal secrets, or even danger. The curse bypasses any attempt at deception or self-censorship, making all spoken words a direct reflection of inner truth. While the victim's logic and reasoning remain intact, their ability to control their verbal output is completely removed, often leading to extreme social awkwardness, embarrassment, or inadvertently revealing critical information.

9.content:
Name: Rebirth
A rare and drastic bodily transformation curse, often triggered by touching a specific artifact or area. It causes the sudden, spontaneous growth of fully formed, functional male genitalia on a female body. The new anatomy is proportionate to the victim's existing physique, appearing as if it was always meant to be there, causing immediate physical discomfort and shock due to its rapid emergence and interference with clothing/armor. The curse is purely physical; it does not alter the victim's gender identity or sexual orientation, leaving them to contend with an unexpected and often bewildering change to their body. Sperm in new organs is fertile. Penis and balls do not replace pussy, but co-exist.

10.content:
Name: The Unwavering Dissent
A curse of stubborn opposition that infects the victim's thought process. It forces the afflicted to instinctively take a contrary stance to any presented fact, opinion, or suggestion, including their own previous conclusions. The curse doesn't make them lie; it genuinely alters their conviction in the moment to be the polar opposite of what was just established. This can lead to them confidently arguing against obvious truths or passionately defending a new course of action they themselves dismissed seconds earlier. The effect is absolute but momentary, shifting with each new piece of information to be contradicted.

lorebooks.creator: turugi_NI

1.name: Sprigatito
1.content:
Sprigatito is a quadrupedal feline Pokémon covered in pale green fur. The fur's composition is similar to that of plants, allowing it to absorb sunlight for energy. It has green ears with pale green insides, a tuft of fur on the front of its chest and a green marking around its pink eyes and nose that resemble leaves. When its mouth is open, two pointed teeth can be seen in its upper jaw. It has a fluffy tail and small paws with pink paw pads underneath and no visible toes.
Type: Grass
Abilities: Overgrow,Protean
Evolution Conditions: Level 16 or higher
Evolution: Floragato

2.name: Floragato
2.content:
Floragato is a bipedal, feline Pokémon. Its body is mostly covered in long light green fur, with green ear tips and a short fluffy tail. It has a growth of green fur-like leaves on its neck, which extends at the front and droops down to its hips, resembling a poncho. Dark green colorations adorn the lower part of this neck fur, along with its hands, feet, and face; the latter is patterned to resemble a mask. Its face also has pink eyes and a small pink nose. Floragato's fur can change in hardness depending on its mood — its fur becomes sharp as needles when it is ready to battle. Each of its hands and feet has a round, pink paw pad and three digits, with visible claws on its fingers.
Type: Grass
Abilities: Overgrow,Protean
Evolution Conditions: Level 36 or higher
Evolution: Meowscarada

3.name: Meowscarada
3.content:
Meowscarada is a humanoid feline Pokémon with light green fur covering most of its body—stopping just above its long, dark green legs—and a short, fluffy tail. The fur is especially longer around its ears, thighs, and arms, the latter resembling poofy sleeves. Its face has lazy pink eyes and a small pink nose, and is covered in a four-pointed mask-like shape, with a pattern of three green diamonds on it. Its ears are curiously more droopy compared to its pre-Evolutions, its mask instead giving the impression of perked-up cat ears. Each of Meowscarada's hands has three fingers tipped with green claws, as well as a pink paw pad. On its neck is a pink collar resembling flower petals. This collar holds together its cape, which grows from the leaves it had around its neck as Floragato. The cape is lined with reflective fur, is black on the outside and green on the inside, and splits into two near the base, with both parts of the cape ending in fleur-de-lis shapes.
Type: Grass,Dark
Abilities: Overgrow,Protean

4.name: Fuecoco
4.content:
Fuecoco is a bipedal crocodilian Pokémon with a mostly red body and a white stomach and face. Its body contains a small flame sac, which constantly leaks fire energy due to its size. The energy releases in the form of two bright yellow tufts of flame on top of its head; should Fuecoco get excited, more of these tufts of flame may emerge. Fuecoco's tufts can emit light. Fuecoco has black eyes and triangular nostrils, and its mouth has three teeth, with one in the upper jaw and two in the lower jaw. It has stubby arms and large feet with two black toes on each foot. Fuecoco has yellow square scales on its stomach, back, tail, and the soles of its feet. These scales are warm to the touch, although they can become heated. The scales absorb external heat, such as from warm rocks where it lies on, to be turned into fire energy.
Type: Fire
Abilities: Blaze,Unaware
Evolution Conditions: Level 16 or higher
Evolution: Crocalor

5.name: Crocalor
5.content:
Crocalor is a bipedal, crocodilian Pokémon. Its stout, melon-shaped body is primarily red, but its face and chest are white simulating a mask; its hands and feet are black with three digits each. It has yellow rectangular scales covering its back and tail, and a pattern of black and yellow stripes on its chest. Its face has a long snout, red square cheeks, a pattern of two red triangles resembling nostrils, and a hook-like upper jaw. When Crocalor opens its mouth, three pairs of sharp teeth can be seen lining its lower jaw.
Type: Fire
Abilities: Blaze,Unaware
Evolution Conditions: Level 36 or higher
Evolution: Skeledirge

6.name: Skeledirge
6.content:
Skeledirge is a large, red, crocodilian Pokémon covered in rectangular scales. Its belly is angular and has a white coloration flanked by black stripes on either side, resembling an open suit jacket and dress shirt. It also has various white-colored patterns on its head, lower jaw, neck, back, shoulders, arms, legs, and the cylindrical tip of its tail. The white coloration on the top of its head resembles a lute. Skeledirge has three black claws on each foot, and although it usually walks on all fours, it is capable of standing on its hind legs.
Type: Fire,Ghost
Abilities: Blaze,Unaware

7.name: Quaxly
7.content:
Quaxly is a white duckling-like Pokémon. It has a yellow beak and blue eyes. It has teal webbed feet and a large teal coif-like crest that covers its head, with a feathery tuft in the front and a white curvy line shaped like a wave. Quaxly's coif has a smooth feel thanks to the rich, moist cream that holds it. The cream it secretes can repel grime. The coif can become unkempt should it get dry.
Type: Water
Abilities: Torrent,Moxie
Evolution Conditions: Level 16 or higher
Evolution: Quaxwell

8.name: Quaxwell
8.content:
Quaxwell is a white, duck-like Pokémon. Its face has blue eyes, a pointed yellow beak, and a teal brow just above it which flares into two large branches flanking a small bump in the middle. On top of Quaxwell's head is a round blue crest twice as large, which droops towards the back. Various blue and teal-colored feathers also adorn its chest, forearms, tail, and the insides of its feet. The three feathers at the end of its arms are similar to fingers. Quaxwell's legs are long and its feet are yellow with three toes each, and they wrap around its ankles in a manner that resembles ballet shoes.
Type: Water
Abilities: Torrent,Moxie
Evolution Conditions: Level 36 or higher
Evolution: Quaquaval

9.name: Quaquaval
9.content:
Quaquaval is a humanoid avian Pokémon resembling a waterfowl. Its plumage is mostly dark blue, except for the light blue on its shoulders and tail, along with the white on its head, neck, chest, and individual tail feathers. Its face has blue eyes and a pointed yellow beak. Atop its head is a large, flowing, slick, dark blue crest, with long light blue and orange-red feathers at the front, separating the crest from the head. Its forearms have three sets of feathers, each tipped with light blue; and it has what resembles hands with three "fingers" each. Additional light blue accents decorate its waist and legs. Its yellow feet have bulbous segments with three toes each; the front-most segments are orange in color. It has a defined rump and an elaborate-looking tail, with a circular base and three teardrop-shaped feathers decorating it at the top, along with two chains consisting of three feathers flanking it on either side.
Type: Water,Fighting
Abilities: Torrent,Moxie

10.name: Lechonk
10.content:
Lechonk is a stout Pokémon resembling a hog. Its body is almost entirely grayish black, except for the brown colorations on its face and ears, and the yellow growths under its eyes that resemble teardrops. Its ears are droopy with yellow insides, and they partially cover its eyes. It has a triangular pink snout with two huge oval nostrils as well as stubby feet ending in pink hooves. Its tail is short and curled.
Type: Normal
Abilities: Aroma Veil,Gluttony,Thick Fat
Evolution Conditions: Level 18 or higher
Evolution: Oinkologne
